name: Mark Warner
subject: The intel report.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Breathtaking contacts with Russia
|
---

| | Derek --

Today, the Senate Intelligence Committee released our fifth and final report on Russian interference in the 2016 election.

Many of my constituents have asked me about this particular report, so I wanted to take some time to break down our findings and provide context.

I will be frank about what we found. There were a stunning number of contacts between members of the Trump campaign and Russian government operatives.

This report is the result of three years of bi-partisan work, hundreds of interviews with witnesses, and millions of documents. I'm proud to be a leader on the committee that produced it.

The document we just released is nearly 1,000 pages. It is the most comprehensive look into the ties between the 2016 Trump presidential campaign and Russia that has been done to date, and it details a grave counterintelligence threat to our elections.

I believe the report speaks for itself. That is why I encourage everyone to take a careful look at Volume 5 -- at the documented evidence of extensive and absolutely unprecedented interference in our electoral system by Russians and their operatives on behalf of then-candidate Donald Trump -- and to draw their own independent conclusions.

This cannot happen again. Our elections should be fair and free of foreign interference.

Unfortunately, that was not the case in 2016. I will continue to fight for strong electoral protections in the Senate. The lessons learned from this report should serve as a blueprint for how to protect our democracy, and our executive branch, Congress, and the American people should heed the warnings in this document.

-- Mark Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db5b/53d9897e/5430c6b0/1c882e62/3566046196/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200818_f_1_nd__714__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

| Derek- Earning Senator John Sununu's endorsement yesterday is a huge honor -- and I hope shows you the kind of principled conservative I am. We have to get this message out there about this huge achievement, though. Can you contribute $25 today and help? We just need 4 more contributions to help hit our goal, and I'm hoping you'll be one of those four!
_**[>> Put a true New Hampshire conservative in Congress](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDkwODQ0NDg1OTI2NTI0Mjg4JmM9aDFsMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zOTA1OTc4NTQmZD1rNnYxcjFs.HeufG-UTXYM8oPBIKSr0ea3t1qM3QUlV2faHVsTnbJI)**_ Thank you, -Matt \----------------------------------------------- From: Matt Mayberry
Subject: Major development:
Date: August 17, 2020 Derek-- As one of my biggest supporters, I wanted to share some _INCREDIBLE_ news with you first: Former U.S. Senator John E. Sununu just endorsed my campaign for Congress -- one of nearly 600 Granite Staters who are committed to helping us fight. Senator Sununu is a committed conservative who stood strong for New Hampshire values during his time in the U.S. Senate, and that's exactly the kind of Congressman I will be for New Hampshire's First Congressional District! Not only did Senator Sununu endorse our campaign, he also made a generous contribution. [_**Join Senator Sununu and put a true New Hampshire conservative in Congress**_](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDkwODQ0NDg1OTI2NTI0Mjg4JmM9aDFsMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zOTA1OTc4NTcmZD1iNGw3aDZw.Ndr3airMSPc9bfjgoIkjuYlhgcJhQzC4wF9mUo5a9cw) While my opponent's few endorsements and support are from Washington, DC and New Jersey -- and he just moved here in January – I am INCREDIBLY proud of the endorsements and dollars that matter the most: those from New Hampshire! **[_Join Senator Sununu and help us finish the next few weeks strong!_](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDkwODQ0NDg1OTI2NTI0Mjg4JmM9aDFsMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zOTA1OTc4NjAmZD1iOGMybDFm.11XnWJo34BBrgzAYksZdH2EVNf5e0G24sfI_RUUZFNY)** Please -- do whatever you can ASAP! Thank you,
Matt Mayberry

name: =?utf-8?Q?=E2=9C=85_Jon_Ossoff_for_Senate?=
subject: What Stacey Abrams just said
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Another inspiring convention night so far! |
---
Friend -- We know night two of the Democratic National Convention is still going on, so we'll make this quick.

We just wanted to say how exciting it was for us to hear from three Georgia leaders on a national stage tonight: **Former Acting Attorney General Sally Yates, State Rep. Sam Park, and Stacey Abrams.**

As a national leader on the issue, Stacey naturally highlighted the importance of voting rights:

**"In a democracy, we do not elect saviors," she said tonight. "We cast our ballots for those who see our struggles and pledge to serve ... who defend our way of life by protecting our right to vote."**

Like Jon Ossoff, these Georgians are the kind of leaders America deserves and needs.

**[Friend, are you as fired up as us? Chip in $15 right now to elect Jon in Georgia and give Joe Biden a Democratic Senate.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e254d/5b2c1286/3f256558/25f1b0b4/2797416102/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_18_conv_sa?refcode=em_2020_08_18_conv_sa&amount=15")** | | [Chip in $15 to elect Jon!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e254d/5b2c1286/3f256558/25f1b0b4/2797416102/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_18_conv_sa?refcode=em_2020_08_18_conv_sa&amount=15")
---
Friend, when Donald Trump tried to enact his unconstitutional Muslim ban, Georgia's own Sally Yates made good on her oath of office and stood up for freedom of religion. Trump fired her. Sally made Georgia proud by putting her principles over her position, and tonight, she made America proud by voicing support for Joe Biden.

Sam Park, who moderated a town hall with Jon just two weeks ago, represents the future of Georgia politics. A trailblazer, Sam became the first openly gay man elected to the Georgia State Legislature in 2016. During the rapid-fire keynote address, he lamented that under Trump's rule, teachers in Georgia are being asked to return to classrooms without a plan to keep them safe.

**And Stacey Abrams, well, you know Stacey.**

In 2018, she came within 55,000 votes of becoming Governor, running against the man who oversaw his own election. _Since then, OVER 750,00 NEW VOTERS are registered and able to vote here in Georgia._

**This November, these new Georgia voters are going to turn out in huge numbers to send Jon Ossoff to the U.S. Senate and give Democrats a Senate majority.**

Jon is proud to be fighting voter suppression alongside Stacey Abrams, and he's proud to have the grassroots support of people like you.

**[Will you make a donation TONIGHT to usher in new leadership in Washington by making sure Jon Ossoff wins in Georgia?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e254d/5b2c1286/3f256558/25f1b0b7/2797416102/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_18_conv_sa?refcode=em_2020_08_18_conv_sa")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Celebrating Women's Suffrage, Calling For Sports This Fall
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-jd/) August 18, 2020 **Saturdays Should Be Game Days** Bill Hagerty released his latest editorial in the _Knox News Sentinel_ last week calling for college football to come back this Fall. America needs football and sports now more than ever. We need a return to normalcy. We need something to bring us together. The sooner that our lives can return to a sense of normalcy, the sooner we can recover from the havoc this pandemic has wreaked. You can read Bill's latest editorial in full [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-r/) **National Right To Life Is Team Hagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-y/) Last week, the National Right To Life Committee joined the Susan B. Anthony List in supporting Bill Hagerty for United States Senate. As a Christian conservative and a father of four children, Bill knows just how precious the right to life is. We are so proud to have yet another leader in the fight to protect the right to life join Team Hagerty.You can read more about this announcement in the press release [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-j/) **Looking To November** We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must reelect President Donald Trump for four more years and stand up to the radical liberals who want to push America toward a socialist state. **Celebrating 100 Years Of Women's Suffrage** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-t/) Today is the 100th anniversary of women being granted the right to vote in the United States. Tennessee was vital in securing women's suffrage and as we celebrate this historic day - remembering the Tennesseans that lead the charge to make our state the final state needed to ratify the 19th Amendment.
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-i/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-d/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-h/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Tennessean:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-k/) **Despite heated primary, Tennessee Republicans say they are united for November**[Shelbyville Times-Gazette:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-u/) **Bedford County picks Hagerty**[Oak Ridger:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-o/) **Anderson County votes like state on Hagerty, but not Bradshaw; locals elected**[Nashville Scene:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-m/) **A Favorite vs. an Underdog in U.S. Senate Race**[Jewish News Syndicate:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-c/) **Former ambassador Bill Hagerty to keep up pressure on Iran, maintain support of Israel
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-f/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-e/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-jl/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-jy/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-jj/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-jt/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdtdz-fuutjhhtj-ji/)

clean_body: #TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox No images? August 18, 2020 Saturdays Should Be Game Days Bill Hagerty released his latest editorial in the Knox News Sentinel last week calling for college football to come back this Fall. America needs football and sports now more than ever. We need a return to normalcy. We need something to bring us together. The sooner that our lives can return to a sense of normalcy, the sooner we can recover from the havoc this pandemic has wreaked. You can read Bill's latest editorial in full National Right To Life Is Team Hagerty Last week, the National Right To Life Committee joined the Susan B. Anthony List in supporting Bill Hagerty for United States Senate. As a Christian conservative and a father of four children, Bill knows just how precious the right to life is. We are so proud to have yet another leader in the fight to protect the right to life join Team Hagerty.You can read more about this announcement in the press release Looking To November We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must reelect President Donald Trump for four more years and stand up to the radical liberals who want to push America toward a socialist state. Celebrating 100 Years Of Women's Suffrage Today is the 100th anniversary of women being granted the right to vote in the United States. Tennessee was vital in securing women's suffrage and as we celebrate this historic day - remembering the Tennesseans that lead the charge to make our state the final state needed to ratify the 19th Amendment. Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty Press Highlights Despite heated primary, Tennessee Republicans say they are united for November Bedford County picks Hagerty Anderson County votes like state on Hagerty, but not Bradshaw; locals elected A Favorite vs. an Underdog in U.S. Senate Race Former ambassador Bill Hagerty to keep up pressure on Iran, maintain support of Israel What They're Saying... "Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!" " TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" " I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." " Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." " Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families." " Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man." " Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative." " Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground." " Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!" " We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud." " We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty." " I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty." " Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County." " You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_ | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Team Hagerty P.O. Box 150748 Nashville, TN 37215 |

name: Laura Loomer
subject: WE WON!!
disclaimer_text: paid for by special interests in Washington
body:
The results of the Florida Primary are still coming in and the projected winner of the Florida 21 Republican Primary is . . . me!
| | |
Patriot,

The results of the Florida Primary are still coming in and the projected winner of the Florida 21 Republican Primary is . . . me!

I’m overwhelmed with thanks for you and the thousands of other patriots who have supported my campaign. Thank you so much!!

For much of my life before politics, I was a lone wolf, prowling the streets of New York City and Washington DC, armed with a mobile phone and a selfie stick, pouncing on unsuspecting Democrat senators or hypocritical Hollywood celebrities.

I don’t know if you know this, but I am the youngest, Jewish, first-time Republican candidate for Congress **in history**.

**When I win this race in November, I’ll be the first female Republican millennial female Congresswoman in Washington.**

On top of all that, today just so happens to be the one hundredth anniversary of the ratification of the Nineteenth Amendment, which granted women in the United States the right to vote. So yes, the victory tonight has momentous meaning to me.

I started out on this journey thanks to a battle on social media and on college campuses throughout this nation. This battle has been raging since before President Trump was elected.

It is a war between those of us who believe in free expression, the right of every American to share his or her views, whatever they may be, and the forces of far-Left progressivism in the Democrat Party and Silicon Valley who want to win by censoring and intimidating the rest of us into silence.

They thought they could silence me by taking away my social media, suffocating my voice and denying me access to essential goods and services.

They almost did.

But there was something nagging at me, insisting at me. Something in the back of my head was telling me that I had to do something about the threats to free speech in this country.

That was my motivation in running for office.

Because, if they can do it to me, they can do it to you.

**And they are doing it to you.**

They’re even doing it to the President of the United States.

We have got to stop them.

These people are not going to stop until we beat them back for good, with trench-fighters in Congress who know how fight, and how to win.

I am one of those fighters.

Because without the First Amendment, none of the other issues matters. The purpose of censorship from the media, Big Tech and all the other Democrat institutions in this country is to restrict the scope of allowable discussion to a tiny battlefield in which only the Left can win.

We can’t let them. Free expression is a core American value that underpins our entire civilization.

Take it away, and this country will no longer be the America that sent a man into space, or which has produced economic, cultural and technological marvels. Without free speech, there is no America—no shining example of what is possible when aspiration meets ingenuity and indefatigability.

It was using their powers of free speech, writing under the pseudonym Publius, that Alexander Hamilton and James Madison argued for the ratification of our Constitution.

And it is free speech that has been the engine of progress throughout the western world. Without the ability to hold the powerful to account, corruption and nepotism take hold.

The question we have to ask ourselves is this: **Is America, the great experiment, over?**

The forces of darkness would like you to think so. But you and I are going to prove them wrong.

I hope you’re ready for the fight. **Because I can’t do this without you.**

My opponent Lois Frankel has spent her entire life in politics. **She is a four-decade career politician.** But recently, she has performed a cynical hard-left turn, in order to become a mentor to “The Squad.”

At the same time, she is bought and paid for by special interests in Washington. The people of this district are no longer represented by Frankel at all, but by Nancy Pelosi and Silicon Valley.

Lois Frankel does not work for the American people, nor the voters of District 21. And, as her career winds to a close, my opponent is showing signs of fatigue at just the time we need a renewed sense of energy and purpose.

She is absent, at just the moment we need an advocate.

She is aloof, as we crave someone who will roll their sleeves up and get to work.

She shows moral indifference, when we need someone dedicated and hands-on.

Last year, she voted to impeach President Trump on the basis of the most flimsy, preposterous and partisan articles of impeachment ever issued against a President. It was another sign to us that Frankel is a creature of the swamp who has lost sight of her constituents’ needs and priorities.

So, a win against Frankel is a win against the Democrat Party nationally. It will hurt them to lose her. From all the way down here in Florida, we have the power to give Congressional Democrats a black eye.

As you know, she ran unopposed in 2018. We are not allowing Lazy Lois the same luxury in 2020.

We’re taking her on, and we are going to beat her.

With that said, I want to tell you this right now . . .

I promise and pledge to you here now that I do not work for the Republican Party leadership, the establishment or Washington elitists.

Like President Trump, I am not bought or paid for by special interests or party bosses.

**I’m not one of them. I’m one of you.**

And I will be your champion.

Thank you for placing your trust in me. Thank you for your time, your continued contributions and your boundless enthusiasm.

**I will not let you down.**

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-388965-916956-84585d41bbe610b-ef7885468d)

name: Bill Olson
subject: Victory!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary! I am the new Republican nominee, running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g

OK, that's behind us- but now, we have a bigger task.

The Democrats- radicalized, violent, propagandized, and dangerous- seek power in November. But they do not seek to improve your life or improve the Republic.

They seek to destroy us all, in the name of a Marxist revolution none of us need or want. They want to take our freedom and our property out of the most bizarre sense of entitlement I've ever seen:

A group of Black Lives Matter protesters in Seattle marched through a residential neighborhood this week demanding that white residents give up their homes, dramatic video shows.

Footage of the Wednesday demonstration posted to Twitter shows a crowd of dozens chanting “Black lives matter” before an unidentified man projects his ire toward nearby white residents — saying they are living in a historically black section of the city as another woman in the crowd yells that they should “give up” their homes, the clip shows.

“Do you know that before your white ass came here, this was all black people?” the man says. “Do you know people like you came in here and basically bought all the land from the black people for less than what it was worth, kicked them out so you could live here? Do you know that?”

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g

That's right. A Democrat mob doesn't like you, so you have to give up your home? Is this what you want for the next four years?

We are America! We won two World Wars, sent men to the moon, discovered the nuke, built our country to have the highest standard of living in the world. We were the first to guarantee basic liberties to every citizen.

We can do better than this!

Look, I’m just a regular guy. I am not a political bigshot. But 14 months ago I renewed my military oath to protect and defend the Constitution of the United States from all enemies foreign and domestic. Little did I suspect that the Democrat Party would be the home of many of those domestic enemies!

Marxist revolution may become our reality- unless we do something RIGHT NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g

Darren Soto is just like Joe Biden: a Trojan Horse for Socialism, someone who believes far-Left conspiracy theories, and makes excuses for the violent excesses of the far Left.

We patriots must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g
?

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g

I'm an unapologetic patriot. Joe Biden won't stand up for our country. Darren Soto sure as heck won't- he votes with Pelosi 93% of the time!

But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I don't have big swampy PAC money, which is why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g

I am calling all patriots to help me to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g
This is a swing district and we can take it back!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g
today? I have a goal of $50,000 raised by the end of August to get on the air asap. That's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g7gJRibapF6OuRU&b=iRI3oIzjcdhiNfFQtMrC3g
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

| | Peter, If this week’s National Convention has shown us anything, it’s that we’ve got a winning ticket for November. I am so proud to endorse Joe and Kamala as the next president and VP of our country. But the fight for 2020 can’t stop at endorsements. We’ve got to get out the vote like never before. **[Invest $25 in the Vote-by-Mail Outreach Initiative.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18747353/238599962/-211952933?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=Carson.VBM.Convention&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzk3MWFjYy0wOWUyLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zdIZglldn1f3OAs5W0-d4bFI0F2e5cKNZX2R0KvEYkI=)** This year, getting out the vote looks a little different. With COVID-19 cases surging, the ballot box poses a major threat to voters’ health. And the GOP has blocked every effort to extend no-fault voting by mail to the general election. That’s why I’m standing behind the Indiana Democratic Party’s _**[Vote-by-Mail Outreach Program](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18747354/238599963/141087230?refcode=Carson.VBM.Convention&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzk3MWFjYy0wOWUyLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zdIZglldn1f3OAs5W0-d4bFI0F2e5cKNZX2R0KvEYkI=)**_ , an initiative dedicated to educating Hoosiers on voting by mail and sending applications to eligible voters. **[Chip in $15 to the NUMBER ONE GOTV program in the state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18747355/238599964/-211952933?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=Carson.VBM.Convention&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzk3MWFjYy0wOWUyLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zdIZglldn1f3OAs5W0-d4bFI0F2e5cKNZX2R0KvEYkI=)** In 2018, I watched our Party lead a historic vote-by-mail campaign, sending out tens of thousands of vote-by-mail applications in the general election. This year, we need to expand our reach. But it’s going to take resources to get this done. And this program is 100% grassroots-funded; it’s on us to make sure Hoosiers can vote safely in 2020. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll join me in backing the 2020 Vote-by-Mail Outreach Program. name: Bill Hagerty
subject: ICYMI: Bill Hagerty Joins Fox Business’ Lou Dobbs Tonight To Talk Supporting President Trump And The Democrats’ Socialist Agenda
body:
Peter,Tonight, I joined Lou Dobbs on Fox Business to discuss President Trump putting America first by showcasing real leadership and holding China accountable for the global pandemic. We also talked about fighting back against the Democrats' socialist agenda. **Watch the clip[ HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdkdjl-fuutjhhtj-r/)** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdkdjl-fuutjhhtj-y/) **See more content like this[ HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdkdjl-fuutjhhtj-j/)**As I've said before, a Biden-Harris win would be disastrous for our democracy and the American way of life. As the Democrat Party proceeds to nominate Joe Biden, I will continue to fight back against their socialist agenda like the Green New Deal and keep working to help re-elect President Donald Trump for another four years. Together, we will continue to hold China accountable, bring our supply chains back to the United States and continue putting America first. Thank you for your continued support and efforts to help elect strong conservative leaders in Tennessee. Best,
Bill | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdkdjl-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdkdjl-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdkdjl-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkdkdjl-fuutjhhtj-u/)

#
My friend Dani Brzozowski is fighting to unseat the last remaining Republican member of Congress in northern Illinois, and I need your help to make sure she wins. Her opponent is an anti-choice, anti-healthcare conservative who has been in office for nearly a decade with little to show for it. **It’s time to replace him with somebody who will stand up and fight for our values like I know Dani will. ** When Dani gets to Washington, I’ll have a partner who will work with me to achieve our common goals like universal healthcare and equal pay for equal work, but she won’t get there without your help. [Can you join me in supporting Dani to flip this seat?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a5d4ab4611&e=140a9b81e7) Dani has the momentum in this race, and her opponent knows it. That’s why he’s calling on his friends from Wall Street, pharmaceutical companies, and the NRA to pour dark money into his campaign and drown out her message. **We can’t let conservative special interests silence Dani and keep this seat. ** Your donation to Dani’s campaign will help make sure she can stand up and push back against the dishonest, corporate-funded smears they will throw at her. **I’m proud to stand with Dani, and I need you to stand with her, too**. [Chip in today and help elect a progressive leader for northern Illinois. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=5bd8f71b8d&e=140a9b81e7) Congresswoman Jan Schakowsky

name: Hegar, MJ
subject: Back to school
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn refuses to do the basic research on COVID-19 necessary to keep our kids safe.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e06/7f51f7bc/432c012b/4ef7ea1e/2242281395/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Sen. Cornyn tried to reassure Texans that it's safe to send our kids back to school in the fall -- he even put out an ad about his efforts, but he's ignored some of the basic, publicly available facts about COVID-19. I for one don't trust him to do what's right for my kids. **[We need to send him packing in November and make sure that we have a senator who cares about our kids.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e06/7f51f7bc/432c012b/4ef7ea1d/2242281395/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200819.1nd__1957__&amount=10")**

**Here 's what he said:**
* "We don't know if children can get [the virus] and transmit it to others."
* "No one under the age of 20 has died of coronavirus."

**Here are the facts:**
* **Children CAN get COVID-19.** In the last two weeks of July ALONE at least 97,000 children tested positive. And that's not including their teachers, bus drivers, other school employees, and their families.
* **Dozens of children under the age of 15 _have_ died from COVID-19.**

Maybe Sen. Cornyn would know these things if he listened to doctors and public health experts. **But instead he listens to his DC boss, Mitch McConnell,** who said that parents fear having their kids stuck at home in the fall more than they fear their kids catching COVID-19 and dying.

I'm a mom with two young kids -- their safety ALWAYS comes first, and unlike Sen. Cornyn or Mitch McConnell, you can rest assured that I'll do the research to make sure all our kids are safe.

**Will you pitch in to help me defeat Sen. Cornyn this November?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

I'm a mom with two young kids -- their safety ALWAYS comes first, and unlike Sen. Cornyn or Mitch McConnell, you can rest assured that I'll do the research to make sure all our kids are safe. Will you pitch in to help me defeat Sen. Cornyn this November? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" \-- MJ "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. name: Kat Cammack
subject: Thank you, on to victory in November!
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friend,
Thank you for your incredible support during the primary. I am honored that you have elected me as the Republican Nominee for FL-03.
Without you, I would not be here. You gave me your treasure and your time. You chipped in when I asked, made phone calls, and knocked doors.
I truly could not have done it without you.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MI4SV1Nwa9WLRPdq3NjF5AnaNDDWRs_FcFPy7B1f7mMM1lT1Fy3adWkpYCtm_9bdWKxUxdqcUPReDaAMJp5Cm2B-fIgk9LeKfprHUasivEhnw18ADo7M7qjty9b76Qka8wvgsoIaYgwWT69SuEonBKk3wkkqniAkw65m1c3nb9k=&c=52uODqftOu3x6dcXM9TBXJ_Tayr6oJzAyeMUzdkXyBXoREp9Y8s9Mg==&ch=U5C_PfW-LaCk6QYBROlPnuGM1CIzdJO5wBGyV9Fb9S-ZeV2fZj358A==)

| We took last night to celebrate, but I am already back in the office working.
I have received calls from all the candidates in this race. It is time to unify for the conservative cause. There is so much at stake in this upcoming election. Socialism is on the rise across America, and I am ready to take it head on.
As I said on the radio this morning, some might consider this a safe seat, but I don't.
You might think socialism hasn't made its way to FL-03, but it has. My Democrat opponent is running on the same ideas as AOC and Ilhan Omar.
With so much at stake, you need to know that I will work harder than ever to ensure a victory in November.
[We're in this fight together and I still need your help. If you're able to, please consider chipping in whatever you can to help ensure we hold this seat in November.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MI4SV1Nwa9WLRPdq3NjF5AnaNDDWRs_FcFPy7B1f7mMM1lT1Fy3adWkpYCtm_9bdWKxUxdqcUPReDaAMJp5Cm2B-fIgk9LeKfprHUasivEhnw18ADo7M7qjty9b76Qka8wvgsoIaYgwWT69SuEonBKk3wkkqniAkw65m1c3nb9k=&c=52uODqftOu3x6dcXM9TBXJ_Tayr6oJzAyeMUzdkXyBXoREp9Y8s9Mg==&ch=U5C_PfW-LaCk6QYBROlPnuGM1CIzdJO5wBGyV9Fb9S-ZeV2fZj358A==)
Thank you for your consideration,
---

Kat Cammack Republican Nominee for Congress, FL-03

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Another BIG Endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, Last week it was President Trump who called out Max Rose. This week it’s...
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=261A435A1A5662)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

Last week it was President Trump who called out Max Rose for being “a puppet of Pelosi.” This week it’s America’s Mayor Rudy Giuliani.
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=261A435A1A5663)
---
| | “I have a special love for the people of Staten Island. I hate to see them double crossed in Congress by Congressman Rose. He obstructs everything President Trump tries to do. A vote for him is a vote for Pelosi. Vote for Nicole Malliotakis.”

---
| | [ HELP US WIN → ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=261A435A1A5664)
---
| | |
---
| | They see what we see...someone who promised to be independent, then went to Washington and voted 97% of the time with Pelosi to stimulus checks for illegal immigrants, amnesty to gang members and to impeach our President.

There’s another reason our Law and Order Mayor supports our Law and Order Candidate for Congress.

The disturbing reality is, Max Rose:

* Joined those calling to defund the NYPD

* Voted to release convicted felons

* Supported the disastrous bail reform

* And supports the closure of Rikers Island

While Nancy Pelosi’s Money Machine continues to bankroll Max Rose’s campaign, the NYPD budget was slashed, crime has spiked in NYC and Max Rose continues to say one thing in the district and do another in Washington.
[
It’s time we have a leader in Congress who will stand up to the socialist left that’s dividing our country and calling to dismantle the thin blue line protecting our community.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=261A435A1A5663)

But I can’t do this without you.

---
| | |
---
| | [ DONATE NOW → ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=261A435A1A5663)
---
| | |
---
| | With outside PACs and Nancy Pelosi’s Money Machine spending millions in airwave ads to spread false lies about me, I need your help more than ever to have enough funds to reach voters and get our next ad on TV.

[There’s a lot at stake this November... Can I still count on you?](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=261A435A1A5663)

---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---

---
| | [ CHIP IN $25 → ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=261A435A1A5666)

body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d030e/72412298/48648701/61062767/1587776476/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3")

| | **Famed Pollster Nate Silver said that Trump still has a shot at winning the election, Peter!** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d030e/72412298/48648701/61062766/1587776476/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/confirm-your-record3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3") This isn't looking good for us! We want to be able to push back on Nate Silver's claim that Trump still has a path to victory -- _because we KNOW there is widespread support for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris!_ **But unfortunately when we pulled our supporter report it seems we still have** __NO RECORD__**of who you are committed to vote for this November![Will you take a moment to correct the record and set us straight on where you stand this year?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d030e/72412298/48648701/61062769/1587776476/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/confirm-your-record3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+take+a+moment+to+correct+the+re&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3")**
### **Record for:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d030e/72412298/48648701/61062768/1587776476/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/confirm-your-record3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+email&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3")**
State: PA
Deadline: 11:59 PM
Vote Preference: UNKNOWN
## **Who has your vote for the Presidency in November?**
| | | [Joe Biden & Kamala Harris](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d030e/72412298/48648701/6106276b/1587776476/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/confirm-your-record3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Joe+Biden+amp+Kamala+Harris&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3")
---
| | [Donald Trump & Mike Pence](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d030e/72412298/48648701/6106276a/1587776476/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/confirm-your-record3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Donald+Trump+amp+Mike+Pence&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3")
---
This is our _LAST CHANCE_ before the Democratic Convention ends to show we stand with Joe Biden for President -- and against another 4 years of Donald Trump!
We're planning to report that _at least 35,000_ of our supporters are OVERWHELMINGLY on Joe Biden and Kamala Harris' side by MIDNIGHT tonight. [**So please, respond to have your record included in our tabulated results.**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d030e/72412298/48648701/6106276d/1587776476/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/confirm-your-record3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+So+please+respond+to+have+your+record+in&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3")
This is urgent!
\-- the Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d030e/72412298/48648701/6106276c/1587776476/VEsO/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=8+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200819_NateSilver_U3_X3")

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I sued Trump to protect the post office. The USPS reversed course, but it doesn’t undo the damage already done.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Postmaster General DeJoy said that he’s postponing changes to the USPS until after the election. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDu-vwqLvT_zFVnml_X30AvrftkqHK3yyebzW3ytf2eJnU8f04X-WbHfp19H70xqQWErYnPEJQE1OMvJ92WX5QVjeEVOfsAWA3CVMK3YRRB3u-eE_vMUuJlR1vcr_zqcJFrZkDAbfJcA3ejGd4jM3GFrd1upeW8UqLiQYbZ9HF-HdrciNSVgLChpp2Ony7YJIfypxfXe8qGJcYVq8bor9yoI_Cbjh968-IQjZCn26HIsuPqKiVONe_4srMWiUyVjHUKwR6LblxhVrzy95BOKQio5xNTCJwi5dEnRT8nNyUqcSmW1Z5W0mMOJrdHTGkGHlpBexRsL4kAP8ku7TuHIQcK54e8lkbN0xyIUYm9H0wqM_oe4IgGTfNe0mJ5O91weJ3-8GbFutBpWJu_SyFH4eKB_Tl79O4KK5k4un7zeTN6cwHWjX_GcIRUw9Bwj6maCR5Ipuu716Pz2z7dGQGEeGbY1kkppbSf3Ybx6xrFEfTsIZU/34g/wnkYdtPWQ56IBhXdueHPqA/h0/9HV1jKCp2cuJAdalp7x_lmDJARdDOIob9Bz2z3S0Qo4) , Since we announced our lawsuit on Monday, Postmaster General DeJoy said yesterday that the USPS will postpone operational changes until after the election. **We’re glad DeJoy has taken notice of our lawsuit.‬ This is a good first step, but it doesn’t undo the damage already done. We’ll still be proceeding with our case.** Under DeJoy, the USPS has deliberately reduced its letter-carrying capacity by ripping out postal boxes and removing or destroying 671 mail sorting machines. He also stopped granting overtime pay to employees. **DeJoy must commit to reversing all of the damage he’s done. clean_body: Postmaster General DeJoy said that he’s postponing changes to the USPS until after the election. | | | , Since we announced our lawsuit on Monday, Postmaster General DeJoy said yesterday that the USPS will postpone operational changes until after the election. We’re glad DeJoy has taken notice of our lawsuit.‬ This is a good first step, but it doesn’t undo the damage already done. We’ll still be proceeding with our case. Under DeJoy, the USPS has deliberately reduced its letter-carrying capacity by ripping out postal boxes and removing or destroying 671 mail sorting machines. He also stopped granting overtime pay to employees. DeJoy must commit to reversing all of the damage he’s done. We cannot assume this administration will stick to its word, and we will not turn back now. Thank you again for your support. We must remain vigilant and ensure that we preserve both the sanctity of the USPS and the integrity of the November elections. name: Mary & the TNDP Team
subject: UPDATE: Tomorrow DNCC Convention Day 4 | Tom Perez & Andrew Yang
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/tndp%20isaac%20300%20px.png]Dear Peter,
HAPPY DAY THREE OF #DEMCONVENTION WEEK!
Today, during our delegation breakfast, we heard from Eric Holder, America's first Black Attorney General; from Rep. Sharice Davids, America's first LGBT indigenous Congresswoman; and from Rep. Rosa DeLauro, a fierce advocate for women's rights.
Here's what's happening tomorrow:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/DNC%20BREAKFASTS%20%281%29.png]
DELEGATION BREAKFAST: Thursday, 8/20, 8:30-10:00 AM CT
Join Chair Mary Mancini and the Tennessee Delegation each morning for breakfast featuring nationally known Democratic leaders. Tickets are $25 per breakfast.
• DNC Chair Tom Perez
• Scott Pierce, CEO of Blue Cross Blue Shield of Tennessee
• Democratic Presidential Candidate Andrew Yang
• State House Democratic Caucus Assistant Leader Harold M. Love, Jr.
• State House Democratic Caucus Vice Chair Antonio Parkinson
• State House Representative Yusuf Hakeem
• Shelby County Mayor Lee Harris
• Chattanooga Mayor Andy Berke
• U.S. Congressional Candidate Renee Hoyos
• U.S. Congressional Candidate Kiran Sreepada
• U.S. Congressional Candidate Blair Walsingham (TN)
• State House Candidate Mariah Phillips
Purchase Tickets! [https://tndp.org/2020-dnc-breakfasts/] | Facebook Event [https://www.facebook.com/events/217274179727923/]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/DOODLES-FOR-DEMOCRATS-tndp-webpage-1.png]
DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS AUCTION
How can you own a one-of-a-kind piece of art AND help to elect Democrats in Tennessee? DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS! Artists, musicians, activists, writers, and politicians took a high quality heavyweight mixed media 6 x 8 inch artist board, picked up the artistic implement of their choice and doodled away. And the results have been outstanding. Visit the TNDP DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS AUCTION (Live on Sunday, August 16, 2020 at 8:00 am CT). [https://tndp.org/doodles/]
VISIT THE AUCTION [https://www.betterunite.com/TNDP-tndpdoodlesfordemocrats/Auction?a=39ca3e40-18f5-4601-b47b-f22811e3bf99] | FACEBOOK [https://www.facebook.com/events/589833798588681]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/sponsors.png]
See you "at" #DemConvention.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
SUPPORT TENNSSEE CANDIDATES
The momentum built during convention is paramount and crucial to this election cycle in Tennessee as we fight to flip the state legislature. Donations made will go to direct efforts to support candidates up and down the ballot this fall. We need you in this fight alongside us. THANK YOU!

I will be stopping at our GOP Headquarters this Saturday to meet with volunteers for breakfast and to knock some doors.

Our race is rated a "toss-up" by national forecastors and the polling shows we're in a dead heat with our radical opponent! To win this election, we need to talk to voters at their doors. We need your help!

Please join me this Saturday and RSVP by clicking this link: [Miller-Meeks day of action](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=087dd4ae7b&e=16fac31a0f).

Thank you for your support!

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

name: Sara Gideon
subject: Can I count on you to make a contribution right away to help us reach the seven percent of voters who remain undecided? This is important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
I'm about to ask you to make a contribution to support my campaign. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
A recent poll shows me 3 points ahead of Senator Collins. But that's not the number I want you to focus on.
**What 's even more important is that 7% of voters are still undecided.** That's enough to either make or break our lead in this race -- and with less than three months until election day, we are running out of time to reach them.
That's why Senator Hassan suggested I reach out personally to ask:

name: Barack Obama
subject: Before I give my convention speech, I need you to hear this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The first time I spoke at a Democratic convention, I asked a simple question: |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Peter, sixteen years ago, the first time I spoke at a Democratic convention, I asked a simple question: Do we participate in a politics of cynicism, or do we participate in a politics of hope?

It's a question that's more relevant than ever today, as I prepare my speech for this year's convention. I know the answer, and I think you do, too. So before I share my thoughts, [I'd like to ask you to chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help elect my friend Joe Biden as the next President of the United States.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

**The Republican Party made its choice long ago, and we're seeing the consequences of it every day.** They have no answers for the COVID-19 pandemic that has stolen the lives of more than 170,000 Americans and shuttered countless businesses -- just excuses and blame.

They offer no help for the millions of Americans who have lost their jobs, and who now must make unthinkable choices like whether to spend the last dollars in their checking account on rent or food.

**They have no serious plans for the great challenges facing us for years to come,** and they barely even pretend to. Instead, they try to fan the flames of resentment to divide and distract us from their failures.

**Joe Biden is different.** And Peter, if you're ready to reject the politics of cynicism and resume the hard work of building a more just, more generous, more democratic America, then [I need you to chip in $5 or whatever you can to help elect Joe Biden in November.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

**Joe practices the politics of hope** \-- not a blind hope, but a hard-won faith that America is better than this, and that our best days still lie ahead of us.

I saw it every single day when we worked together at the White House. He was instrumental to helping us rebuild from the last Republican recession. He can do it again - not in a way that benefits the rich and well-connected, but in a way that grows the economy for everybody.

**That's because Joe Biden is a man who lives the values his parents passed on to him.** Hard work. Dignity. Respect. Responsibility. He is a man whose own life has taught him how to persevere through the hardest of times and the greatest of loss.

Joe feels the grief of every family that's lost loved ones to this pandemic. He understands the pain of the mothers and fathers who have to tell their children that they've lost their jobs. But most importantly, he knows where to take us from here - how to use the power of the presidency to address our nation's great challenges head-on, and to build back better.

Perhaps most importantly, **Joe understands that when times get tough, we don't give up -- we get up.** And so it's time for us all to get up, right now, and stand with Joe in this fight for the soul of America.

[I'm urging you, Peter: Please pitch in $5 or whatever you can afford right now to help elect Joe Biden as the next President of the United States.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

clean_body: The first time I spoke at a Democratic convention, I asked a simple question: | | "" Peter, sixteen years ago, the first time I spoke at a Democratic convention, I asked a simple question: Do we participate in a politics of cynicism, or do we participate in a politics of hope? It's a question that's more relevant than ever today, as I prepare my speech for this year's convention. I know the answer, and I think you do, too. So before I share my thoughts, "" The Republican Party made its choice long ago, and we're seeing the consequences of it every day. They have no serious plans for the great challenges facing us for years to come, and they barely even pretend to. In just 75 days, we’ll all look back and wonder if we did our part to elect Mike Siegel -- and we don’t want you to look back with any regrets. The only way we’ll win this election is if we have thousands and thousands of conversations with voters. We have a winning message, but we need to make sure enough voters hear it! And we can’t do it without your help. body:
Tonight at 5 p.m. PT, Linda will be participating in the Todos con Biden pre-program watch party for the Democratic National Convention. The evening will be hosted by comedian Cristela Alonzo!

RSVP so you can follow along at home >>

Linda will join Latino supporters from across the country to watch tonight's convention! Join her and the thousands of other at-home viewers who will be watching the evening's speakers, along with taking action each day.

A pre-program virtual event will be held on Wednesday, August 19th and Thursday, August 20th at 5:00 p.m. PT, which will precede the main Convention Program Watch Party from 6:00 - 8:00 p.m. PT.

Hope to see you there!

-- Sánchez HQ

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Join us for the 2020 Border "Bus" Tour
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

In 2018, Congresswoman Veronica Escobar (TX-16) — along with Beto's Senate
campaign, the El Paso Democratic Party, and End Citizens United —
organized the first Border Bus Tour. The tour was a chartered bus full of
volunteers who drove the entire length of the US-Mexico border in Texas,
stopping to speak to voters, holding rallies, and knocking on doors along
the way.

This year, the Border "Bus" Tour is going fully virtual due to the
coronavirus pandemic, and we're inviting Powered by People supporters to
join us this year to generate excitement for the upcoming elections. Will
you join us for a couple hours next week?

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34400?source=ema20200819-101923&t=1001&akid=101923%2E444211%2ECOAysg ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34400?source=ema20200819-101923&t=1002&akid=101923%2E444211%2ECOAysg ]Monday, August 24, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34400?source=ema20200819-101923&t=1003&akid=101923%2E444211%2ECOAysg ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34401?source=ema20200819-101923&t=1004&akid=101923%2E444211%2ECOAysg ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34401?source=ema20200819-101923&t=1005&akid=101923%2E444211%2ECOAysg ]Wednesday, August 26, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34401?source=ema20200819-101923&t=1006&akid=101923%2E444211%2ECOAysg ]Get more info or RSVP »

In 2018, after the Border Bus Tour, Texas voter turnout increased 77% over
the previous midterm election, and saw the highest midterm turnout in four
decades. In El Paso, turnout increased 149.2% from the previous midterm.

And in many of the cities we visited, the people we spoke to said it was
the first time they've been asked to vote — ever. That's exactly what
we're trying to change, one interaction at a time, and fight to earn every
vote to flip Texas blue and stop Trump forever along the way.

See you on the dialer,

The Powered by People team

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=101923%2E444211%2ECOAysg

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

subject: 75 Days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA REPUBLICAN
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **In a few short months, Montanans will vote for President, US House and Senate, Land Board, and a new Montana Legislature.

Our country and our state may look much different on November 4th than it did just 24 hours prior. ** **Our message is winning but we cannot afford to be complacent. ** **There are stark differences between candidates in every race most notably between myself and my opponent. ** **I am a businessman, entrepreneur, and combat veteran with practical experience in the industries regulated in this office.** **I have founded and operated a national insurance company. I have worked in and been licensed in the securities industry. I have clear plans on the Land Board- protecting what we care about, developing natural resources, protecting access and private property rights, and raising money for education. ** **My opponent has none of these. ** **Experience is important in a race for a seat as important and complicated as the Commissioner of Insurance and Securities. ** _**We can’t trust this office to a rookie who has zero business experience.**_
---

body:
Dear Friend,

The Democratic National Convention this week says it all - Democrats are salivating over the chance to win in November, reverse President Trump's work to drain the swamp, and implement Joe Biden and Kamala Harris' radical socialist agenda. We have to hold the line, and that includes sending Doug Collins -- President Trump's fiercest defender -- to the U.S. Senate in November. Click HERE (https://secure.anedot.com/collins-for-senate/incredible) to view our newest ad!

CLICK HERE TO HELP US CONTACT VOTERS AND LET THEM KNOW TO VOTE FOR DOUG COLLINS. (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins)

Sincerely,

Will Smith

Political Director
Collins for Senate, Inc.

**
Team Collins on the Campaign Trail
------------------------------------------------------------

Thank you to the Greater Fayette Republican Women's club for inviting Doug to celebrate the 100th anniversary of women's suffrage!

Kicking our day off on Saturday with breakfast at Blairsville Skillet Cafe with the Union County GOP!
Whether it's joining Doug at an upcoming event, contacting voters, or putting up a yard sign, we need your help! Visit our website (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins) or email us at grassroots@dougforgeorgia.com.

============================================================
DOUG IN THE NEWS
** ICYMI: Fox News: Doug Collins Discusses Historic Deal Between Israel and UAE w/Judge Jeanine (https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=293141331783771&extid=HCcuP1NI58jdDeOI)
Doug Collins and fmr. Congressman Darrell Issa discuss the new Russia probe developments and the President's announcement of a historic deal between Israel and the UAE.

** For the full story click here. (https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=293141331783771&extid=HCcuP1NI58jdDeOI)

** Doug Collins blasts Ayanna Pressley for 'fanning the flames of anarchy' with call for more civil unrest (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/doug-collins-ayanna-pressley-unrest)
"She is carrying the water for the anarchists that are looting and robbing and going through our cities. She's carrying the water for those who want to defund our police and disrespect our police." Collins said.

** For the full story click here. (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/doug-collins-ayanna-pressley-unrest)
** Doug Collins donates 10,000 face shields to five hospital systems, including Northeast Georgia Medical Center (https://www.gwinnettdailypost.com/local/u-s-rep-doug-collins-donates-10-000-face-shields-to-five-hospital-systems-including/article_79e1d982-e16b-11ea-a5ab-234909d07506.html)
"As our health care workers continue fighting on the frontlines of this pandemic, it is imperative that they have access to the resources needed to stay healthy," Collins said.

** For the full story click here. (https://www.gwinnettdailypost.com/local/u-s-rep-doug-collins-donates-10-000-face-shields-to-five-hospital-systems-including/article_79e1d982-e16b-11ea-a5ab-234909d07506.html)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: How the White House Prepared for a Pandemic
body:
The Trump Administration “was well aware of the threat of a pandemic before the novel coronavirus emerged,” Joel Zinberg and Tomas Philipson write | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1625c6a37a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **How the White House Prepared for a Pandemic**

The Trump Administration “was well aware of the threat of a pandemic before the novel coronavirus emerged,” Joel Zinberg and Tomas Philipson write in _The Wall Street Journal_. In fact, a White House report produced last September laid the groundwork for President Trump’s historic push for a vaccine, now known as Operation Warp Speed.

“The report discussed how the lack of private market incentives had led to underinvestment in developing and using innovative technologies that can quickly produce vaccines for a new virus . . . When Covid-19 appeared a few months later, the administration expeditiously applied the report’s lessons on the value of public-private partnerships to speed vaccine innovation and production.”

Now, “new vaccines are being developed at previously unimaginable speed.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2a051895c7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump recently delivered on our recommendation to suspend the payroll tax . . . The Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget estimates that Trump's tax deferral may put $100 billion worth of extra pay back in the pockets of U.S. workers through year-end,” Stephen Moore and Alfredo Ortiz write in [_RealClearMarkets_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e6e3461253&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Chicago police officers have been retiring at double the normal rate recently, raising concerns that the number of new hires won’t keep pace with the number leaving,” Frank Main reports. “Who wants to stay in this environment? . . . The mayor doesn’t back us,” the Chicago Fraternal Order of Police President said. Read more in the [_Chicago Sun-Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ba132417a7&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|
---
| “Science is one of the strongest weapons that we have against this virus, which is why President Trump has enlisted our unrivaled research community in the fight. Since the start of the pandemic, the Trump administration has taken several actions to engage scientists in academia, industry, and government to understand and defeat this disease,” writes Kelvin Droegemeier, President Trump’s science advisor, for the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf09a26ac0&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5464035259&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0227bc3827&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=2345e4e044)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Tom Cotton
subject: PHOTO ENCLOSED: President Trump taking out mailboxes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Peter, Have you heard the latest news from Democrats and the media? President Trump is supposedly taking over the Postal Service to somehow steal the election. That's right--if you believe Democrats, Donald Trump is driving around at night with a baseball bat bashing in their mailboxes.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMzk4ODES1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTU3NDI4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

Have you heard the latest news from Democrats and the media? President Trump is supposedly taking over the Postal Service to somehow steal the election.

That's right--if you believe Democrats, Donald Trump is driving around at night with a baseball bat bashing in their mailboxes.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMzk4ODES1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTU3NDI4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

(Picture [from](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMzk4ODES1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTU3NDI4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) The Babylon Bee)

Democrats and their media allies are convinced that the Postal Service has never delivered a letter a day late before the President Trump took over.

Is this accurate? **Of course not. It 's absurd.** It's just as ridiculous as their conspiracy theory that Donald Trump conspired with Russia to beat Hillary Clinton.

**The bottom line is Democrats are scared that the election is going to be close. They want to preemptively explain their loss. **

How do we fight back? _We beat them in November._

Unfortunately, Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are using this fake news to raise MILLIONS from liberal donors.

That's why I have launched a [**Defund Pelosi Fund**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMzk4ODES1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTU3NDI4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) to ensure we win in November and send Nancy back to San Francisco.
_****_
[Donate Now](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMzk4ODES1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTU3NDI4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Let's send the liberals and Pelosi a loud and clear message (that won't get lost in the mail) that we are sick and tired of their baseless attacks on our President.

Make your immediate online donation to our [**Defund Pelosi Fund**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMzk4ODES1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTU3NDI4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) and let's send Pelosi back to San Francisco once and for all.

In service,
****
****
****
Tom Cotton ****
