name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: If you're with Kamala and me, please show it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Even though we couldn't hold the kind of convention we're used to, I could still feel the same spirit of unity coming from folks' live streams. |
---
Peter --

Seeing folks from across the country coming together for our virtual convention over the past two days has been so inspiring.

Even though we couldn't hold the kind of convention we're used to, I could still feel the same spirit of unity coming from folks' live streams, just as if we were standing in the same room. I hope you felt it too, Peter.

From the beginning, we said this was more than a campaign -- it's a battle for the soul of our nation.

**And if one thing is clear to me about the past two days, it 's that we are ready to go out and show the world that Americans choose hope over fear and unity over division.**

[Peter, I'm more confident than ever that we can win this battle and beat Donald Trump in 76 days. But we have to stand together. If you're with me, please show it by making a $25 donation today.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full") _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Click here to express donate $25 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $50 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $100 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $250 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=250&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $500 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=500&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to donate another amount >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full")** And I bet you can guess my favorite moment of the convention so far -- seeing Jill take the stage last night.

I know she'll make an excellent First Lady, and I hope you were listening when she made this call-to-action to everyone: **"How do you make a broken family whole? The same way you make a nation whole. With love and understanding -- and with small acts of kindness."**

Now, get ready to hear from even more incredible speakers and performers over the next two nights, Peter.

I can't wait to hear from my friends Hillary Clinton, Elizabeth Warren, my running mate Kamala Harris, and President Obama tonight. I hope you'll be watching with me.

[And, if you're able, I hope you'll consider making a contribution of $25 or whatever you can spare to fuel the work we need to do over the next couple of months.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

[https://go.joebiden.com/Donate](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B2_JRBRecap_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Thanks for being a part of this, Peter. See you online tonight.

Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7bf/3612824288/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7be/3612824288/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7bd/3612824288/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7bc/3612824288/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7bb/3612824288/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7ba/3612824288/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7b9/3612824288/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7b8/3612824288/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7b7/3612824288/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7b6/3612824288/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7b9/3612824288/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7b5/3612824288/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7b8/3612824288/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b573/1cd0ac28/168c274c6/357fa7b4/3612824288/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

And if one thing is clear to me about the past two days, it 's that we are ready to go out and show the world that Americans choose hope over fear and unity over division. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" And I bet you can guess my favorite moment of the convention so far -- seeing Jill take the stage last night. I know she'll make an excellent First Lady, and I hope you were listening when she made this call-to-action to everyone: "How do you make a broken family whole? The same way you make a nation whole. With love and understanding -- and with small acts of kindness." Now, get ready to hear from even more incredible speakers and performers over the next two nights, Peter. I can't wait to hear from my friends Hillary Clinton, Elizabeth Warren, my running mate Kamala Harris, and President Obama tonight. I hope you'll be watching with me. "" "" Thanks for being a part of this, Peter. See you online tonight. Joe | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: MJ Hegar
subject: The thing about Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
You've heard a ton about Texas in the 2020 election, and I wanted to tell you a bit more.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e04/7f51f7bc/432319e3/4ef7ec85/4036201329/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Here's the thing about Texas, Peter. You've been hearing a ton about how important this state is on the national level, about how we can win this year, and about how Sen. Cornyn is just really weak. | [TAKE ON SEN. CORNYN](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e04/7f51f7bc/432319e3/4ef7ec84/4036201329/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200819.2nd__1937__&amount=10")
---
All of that is true. Texas is the biggest battleground state this year, and it could determine the future of America for decades to come. Polls put me within single digits of Senator Cornyn, and he while he might not be well-known or well-liked in Texas, he is well-liked by his special interest donors, and they've funnelled money into his war chest.

That makes him dangerous, but it also tells me how we can beat him -- **[with your help.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e04/7f51f7bc/432319e3/4ef7ec84/4036201329/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200819.2nd__1937__&amount=10")**

Only a true grassroots team that doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs can take on Sen. Cornyn -- and that's why I need YOUR help today.

**Will you donate to help us win the single biggest battleground state of 2020?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: You've heard a ton about Texas in the 2020 election, and I wanted to tell you a bit more. | "" | | Here's the thing about Texas, Peter. You've been hearing a ton about how important this state is on the national level, about how we can win this year, and about how Sen. Cornyn is just really weak. | "" All of that is true. Texas is the biggest battleground state this year, and it could determine the future of America for decades to come. Polls put me within single digits of Senator Cornyn, and he while he might not be well-known or well-liked in Texas, he is well-liked by his special interest donors, and they've funnelled money into his war chest. name: =?utf-8?Q?Zephyr=20Teachout?=
subject: Our country needs Ro Khanna
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
Ro has been one of the countries' most important leaders on foreignpolicy, on health care, and building a powerful, grassrootsprogressive moment. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/54df8caa59d4/join-me-andrep-ro-khanna-for-this-special-event-5035044?e=20cc727594)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hi Peter, I met Ro Khanna four years ago, when he was a brand new Congress member, having just beaten an 8-term incumbent. I'll be honest; I thought because he came from Silicon Valley, he would be carrying the water for big tech. I didn't expect much. Wow was I wrong. Ro has been one of the country's most important leaders on foreign policy, on health care, and building a powerful, unafraid, grassroots progressive movement. He endorsed AOC early, and was one of Bernie's co-chairs. [**On Sunday, August 23rd, at 11:00 PT/2:00 ET, I am so excited to be co-hosting an event for him (**_yep, online!_**). I hope you'll join me in supporting him and join both of us to talk about anti-monopoly and its future.**](https://rokhanna.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3c3c1e0a14c5cfd155f9a0603&id=4da1d76228&e=20cc727594) One reason I have come to be a Ro Stan is because of his national leadership on trust-busting, even when it comes to Silicon Valley. I recently wrote a book, _Break 'em Up_ , about how we need a new national anti-monopoly movement, because the corporate giants are stealing from workers and small business owners; Ro has already been ahead of the curve on that, connecting the incredible pain of farm workers and warehouse workers and small business owners. And he does it with such optimism: we need to break up big corporate monopolies because he knows we CAN have an equal, free, joyful society. It doesn't have to be like this. [**He has been outspoken against illegitimate power, consistently brave, and a great champion of people against middlemen. Hope to see you this weekend.**](https://rokhanna.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3c3c1e0a14c5cfd155f9a0603&id=0afeb0072a&e=20cc727594) In solidarity,
Zephyr
---

name: Rob Portman
subject: Biden is coming for OHIO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
Ohio is one of the single most important states when it comes to winning presidential elections. Win Ohio and you win the presidency... it’s almost as Peter, Ohio is one of the single most important states when it comes to winning presidential elections.
Win Ohio and you win the presidency... it’s almost as simple as that.
So it’s no surprise that Joe Biden and the Washington establishment is going to be investing HEAVILY into flipping our state.
I can’t tell you how much they’ll spend. I can’t tell you when it will ramp up. But I can tell you one thing, Peter...
Ohio will be a number-one target from right now, all the way to November 3.
They’ll spend big to make sure that Democrats from every corner of our state turn out in big numbers, not only to put Biden in the White House, but to flip the U.S. Senate in the process nationally.
Peter, if there’s ever been an all-important time to defend our conservative values in Ohio – it’s now. And that’s what I need your help with.
**[I’m fighting tooth and nail to defend our Republican Senate majority, and if you can chip in $25 immediately, you’ll be providing the support I need to keep up the fight. clean_body: Ohio is one of the single most important states when it comes to winning presidential elections. Win Ohio and you win the presidency... it’s almost as Peter, Ohio is one of the single most important states when it comes to winning presidential elections. Win Ohio and you win the presidency... it’s almost as simple as that. So it’s no surprise that Joe Biden and the Washington establishment is going to be investing HEAVILY into flipping our state. I can’t tell you how much they’ll spend. I can’t tell you when it will ramp up. But I can tell you one thing, Peter... Ohio will be a number-one target from right now, all the way to November 3. They’ll spend big to make sure that Democrats from every corner of our state turn out in big numbers, not only to put Biden in the White House, but to flip the U.S. Senate in the process nationally. Peter, if there’s ever been an all-important time to defend our conservative values in Ohio – it’s now. And that’s what I need your help with. - Peter, I want to make sure that Joe Biden doesn’t cruise to victory BY WAY OF OHIO. I need your help right now if we’re going to counter the efforts of the far-left, not only in our state, but around the country. Can I count on your support? –Rob Portman Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate

In Congress, Don Bacon voted:
* AGAINST a bill to modernize the Post Office and create millions of jobs.
* With Wall Street to DEFUND postal banking.

The Post Office is in serious danger, Peter, so we have to act NOW.

I'm determined to unseat Bacon and protect the Post Office, but that hinges on sending this mail to undecided voters.

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e81d/77d4c309/2173ee75/263618d8/2118731867/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e81d/77d4c309/2173ee75/263618db/2118731867/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e81d/77d4c309/2173ee75/263618da/2118731867/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Peter, before I speak tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We can't win this fight without grassroots supporters |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B3_warrenconv_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B3_warrenconv_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Peter --

This is our moment. Our moment to decide who we are as a country. Our moment to dream big and fight hard. And yes, our moment to win this battle for the soul of our nation.

But understand this: to make real progress towards social, racial, and economic justice, we have to win big in November. And we can only do that if we work -- and persist -- together.

**Because Peter -- Joe, Kamala, and I can't do this alone. Grassroots supporters like you have gotten us to this point, but we still have to grow this movement like never before. So before I speak at the Democratic National Convention tonight, I'm asking:**

[Will you make your first contribution to the Biden-Harris campaign right now? Anything you can give will make a powerfully important difference, and help hit the Biden-Harris campaign's $25 million online goal for the convention.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B3_warrenconv_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B3_warrenconv_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Peter, this fight is personal for me. I never in a zillion years thought I'd run for office, but when I saw how the middle class is being hollowed out, and how working people are getting the short end of the stick, I knew I had to get into this fight, to make sure everyone else had the same opportunities I did.

Joe Biden and Kamala Harris understand the challenges working people are facing right now, and under their leadership we can start to build back a better America.

That's why tonight, I will speak at the Democratic National Convention, and why I'll ask people across the country to join me in doing everything we can to elect Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot in November.

**And one powerful thing you can do right now, Peter, is chip in a few bucks -- $25 or whatever makes sense for your budget right now -- to power this grassroots campaign.**

[Peter, we can't win this fight without grassroots supporters. Will you make your first donation to Joe and Kamala's campaign today?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B3_warrenconv_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B3_warrenconv_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth Warren
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5af/1cd0ac28/16801bd80/357faf0a/1092522629/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5af/1cd0ac28/16801bd80/357faf09/1092522629/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5af/1cd0ac28/16801bd80/357faf08/1092522629/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5af/1cd0ac28/16801bd80/357faf07/1092522629/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5af/1cd0ac28/16801bd80/357faf06/1092522629/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5af/1cd0ac28/16801bd80/357faf05/1092522629/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5af/1cd0ac28/16801bd80/357faf03/1092522629/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Add your name: If Trump votes by mail, all Americans should be able to
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We all need to speak up NOW.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8126%2E868730%2EgQv4oQ) Friend, Last Thursday, in an interview with Fox Business, President Trump was candid about why he hadn't properly funded the U.S. Postal Service: _"They need that money in order to have the post office work so it can take all of these millions and millions of ballots. If they don't get those two items, that means you can't have universal mail-in voting because they're not equipped to have it."_ He's not even hiding it: Trump's attacks on the USPS are a deliberate attack on our democracy. Despicable. And what's even worse? On Wednesday, the day before this interview, Donald Trump and his wife Melania requested their own mail-in ballots to vote in Florida's statewide primary election this week. I have long said that mail-in voting is the safest, most effective way to vote. And it's clear that, despite what he says on Fox and what he tweets every single day, Donald Trump actually agrees. In fact, he and his family have voted by mail in almost every recent election.**That's why Washington state is leading a coalition of states who are suing the Trump administration for making drastic changes to the mail service that threaten mail delivery and undermine national elections this November.** **We have to make a strong show of support for the U.S. Postal Service -- after all, if it's good enough for the Trump family, it's good enough for every American family.[Add your name to tell Donald Trump to step up to save the U.S. Postal Service and support mail-in voting for every American this fall.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Tell-Donald-Trump-to-Save-the-USPS/?utm_source=ema_2020-08-19_usps&source=ema_2020-08-19_usps&utm_campaign=usps&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=8126%2E868730%2EgQv4oQ)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Tell-Donald-Trump-to-Save-the-USPS/?utm_source=ema_2020-08-19_usps&source=ema_2020-08-19_usps&utm_campaign=usps&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=8126%2E868730%2EgQv4oQ)
---
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: Christy Smith
subject: Unbelievable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

It is impossible to overstate the importance of the United States Postal Service.

Millions of Americans rely on USPS for essential deliveries like life-saving medications, paychecks, and so much more. And now, as we are facing the worst pandemic in over a century, the USPS will be more crucial than ever in ensuring our free and fair election.

This is what makes Donald Trump and his corrupt Republican cronies' efforts to drain the USPS of funding and resources all the more despicable. And their promise yesterday to do better is like everything else they do -- empty words we cannot trust.

They have shown that they care more about themselves and holding on to power than the lives and futures of regular Americans. They don't care about the mother of three facing eviction who is waiting desperately on a check in the mail or the elderly neighbor having to ration insulin until the next shipment comes.

**Peter, we cannot sit by and let them rob another cornerstone of our democracy. We need to protect our postal system.**

**[Sign here to demand Congress stand up to Donald Trump by taking immediate measures to protect the USPS and secure our elections.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bdc7/29776869/9235c10/569ea60d/1370475912/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MTlfdXNwc19pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2008_email_christy_usps?source=em20_200819_usps_in")** [PROTECT OUR POSTAL SYSTEM](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bdc7/29776869/9235c10/569ea60d/1370475912/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MTlfdXNwc19pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2008_email_christy_usps?source=em20_200819_usps_in") This is personal to me. After serving in World War II, my grandfather served for many years as a postal worker.

From a young age, I knew that the postal service was more than just the place that brings you your mail. It was and is a cornerstone of America -- a presence that was always there, as the saying goes: in the snow, rain, heat, or gloom of night.

We cannot afford to lose this critical institution. People's lives and our democracy depend on it.

We need to reject the efforts of Republican billionaires and campaign donors to bankrupt this essential service and steal the election. **Let's make it clear that we will not stand by while they mess with our elections, safety, and democracy.**

**[Nancy Pelosi is calling the House back to vote on legislation to save the USPS because this is so urgent. Please join me and keep the pressure up.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bdc7/29776869/9235c10/569ea60d/1370475912/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MTlfdXNwc19pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2008_email_christy_usps?source=em20_200819_usps_in")** [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bdc7/29776869/9235c10/569ea60d/1370475912/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MTlfdXNwc19pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2008_email_christy_usps?source=em20_200819_usps_in") Thank you,

Christy

|
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bdc7/29776869/9235c10/569ea60e/1370475912/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MTlfdXNwc19pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200819_usps_in")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bdc7/29776869/9235c10/569ea60e/1370475912/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MTlfdXNwc19pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200819_usps_in")
---

|

PO Box 301, 24307 Magic Mountain Pkwy, Valencia, CA 91355.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bdc7/29776869/9235c10/569ea608/1370475912/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: FWD: Can I count on you to make a contribution right away to help us reach the seven percent of voters who remain undecided? This is important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi, wanted to make sure you saw this note from Sara Gideon.
A recent poll shows her 3 points ahead of Susan Collins, but more importantly,**7% of voters are still undecided on who they 'll vote for. **7% is enough to destroy Sara's small lead -- and with less than three months until election day, there's not much time left to reach them.
**Sara needs 13 more donations from 03264 today to reach those voters.**[**Can she count on your help, everyone? This is incredibly important and $3 or more would be a huge help. Just click here to give.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5c4/2a380d31/23302dd5/f0a53b/3339434412/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDgxOV9NV0g0U0cxLWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20200819_MWH4SG1-k_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
This race could decide Senate and control and the future of the Supreme Court so believe us when we say that the stakes are high here.
Thank you so much for being part of flipping Maine's Senate seat.
-- Team Maggie

_\--------Original Message--------_
Hi there,
I'm about to ask you to make a contribution to support my campaign. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
A recent poll shows me 3 points ahead of Senator Collins. But that's not the number I want you to focus on.
**What 's even more important is that 7% of voters are still undecided.** That's enough to either make or break our lead in this race -- and with less than three months until election day, we are running out of time to reach them.
That's why Senator Hassan suggested I reach out personally to ask:
[**Can I count on you to make a $3 contribution (or anything you can) right away to help us reach these remaining undecided voters? This couldn 't be more important. You can chip in here:**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5c4/2a380d31/23302dd5/f0a53b/3339434412/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDgxOV9NV0g0U0cxLWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20200819_MWH4SG1-k_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: An unacceptable reversal from the DNC [ADD YOUR NAME]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
The DNC must recommit to ending subsidies for the fossil fuel industry.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=2290%2E53494%2EAphbYd) Friend, Until yesterday, the Democratic Party platform included this statement: _"Democrats support eliminating tax breaks and subsidies for fossil fuels, and will fight to defend and extend tax incentives for energy efficiency and clean energy."_ **Unfortunately, the language was struck from the platform in a last minute deal.** This is a shocking reversal -- one that's out of step with the vast majority of Democrats. Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and most other 2020 presidential candidates supported ending fossil fuel subsidies on the campaign trail. It's a core component of the Biden-Harris climate plan. Democratic voters widely support it, as do the vast majority of Americans who do not want to use public funds to bankroll fossil fuel corporations during a recession. The party's 2020 platform is otherwise unprecedentedly progressive on climate. This is the first time any major party platform has ever included 100% clean energy standards, and it also makes historic commitments to environmental justice. But we cannot end the climate crisis without ending fossil fuel bailouts. **[Sign our petition to call on the DNC to recommit to ending fossil fuel subsidies in its 2020 platform.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/755?t=3&akid=2290%2E53494%2EAphbYd)** | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/755?t=4&akid=2290%2E53494%2EAphbYd)
---
Thanks,
Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Campaign Director, Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2290%2E53494%2EAphbYd). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Defend or Defund?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
For the past several weeks, I feel as though when I get online, I see mixed messages between people wanting to defend AND defund the police. This is Peter, For the past several weeks, I feel as though when I get online, I see mixed messages between people wanting to defend AND defund the police.
This is something very serious to me. Something where I have first-hand seen the way that the women and men in blue on the frontlines have stood strong in defense of those not just in the Lehigh Valley – but also across the nation.
So I want to know: Where does the Lehigh Valley stand on defending or defunding the police?
**[Peter, will you take a quick, 20 second survey to let me know here YOU stand? Do you stand in line with my opponent, or do you support defending those in blue?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=56cb892a5f894bd9ad69b4d196f50b22&_e=aXUdKNFckdiOqu-BWEzWk30xqhrp0k-zpsa2WnTII1eDSdqhlHa4yH0uuIE419O17Zroa1XDjAQeCsmGT_AJww2E4E5kN15rbqjghjL0TQctIPDPN3NGMU9oqodJ7GtIW0bbxwL0B0G7lRlxz0mFM9I3NGaZ8Xpe2QBzyhDugTM0xGXXJ5sBKKlqtGiSIRFIZ1CnHMdZ95Ngqrv-XPSNrNjUSXXTiKVGI6VoNT7kNAH9Ex6H3Cy0HuEPqRZ3YnAS_TIB-H23smBsPhClkbpFa2lVM3VawlTUXVEf08MCO6KlBLbu2JEg1y9g2xjvVjCU-lReAPr-igL4_wbutgbq5HbYF4N_PamNmUBi2Ny-VPLpCcgF32248tRUyvecLIqiqX_0QlKyCjhgTOgbZ3UqsWJ3PRpvI4qlHVV-jHqPTQ7_Xjx9AjGvxhmPy2taHERoM4A84zJAFgtGgSUc7n5QVw%3D%3D)** [**I WANT TO DEFUND OUR POLICE FORCE**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=56cb892a5f894bd9ad69b4d196f50b22&_e=aXUdKNFckdiOqu-BWEzWk30xqhrp0k-zpsa2WnTII1eDSdqhlHa4yH0uuIE419O17Zroa1XDjAQeCsmGT_AJww2E4E5kN15rbqjghjL0TQctIPDPN3NGMU9oqodJ7GtIW0bbxwL0B0G7lRlxz0mFM9I3NGaZ8Xpe2QBzyhDugTM0xGXXJ5sBKKlqtGiSIRFIZ1CnHMdZ95Ngqrv-XPSNrBueQPDi6k1pQwcqtLH9YEedEpk0fGq1v6wRh775bWmWjjLlbTHi2c1_n_E6vY9lxcsONwXzxs5cDIekwxOjtbPPJcl8PmjjzAr2fRR9zUqxiC68Ep-EeSJPldzG5wG4ywMwhbmdMQSTgzNSRk8W3loYaFzbl7M-xairGLT77Rat77KDaOBslEwEvQxI6898tnhRG6uFvlDGVeOFh6g5bLOGM9_sHSLEjypBUL2k4__DZ1LKEzcn0DsGaHaI6VUpmw%3D%3D) Peter, while we wait for those results, one thing this is certain: My opponent – Susan Wild – does NOT support defending the police. **[She’s even said so herself:](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=56cb892a5f894bd9ad69b4d196f50b22&_e=aXUdKNFckdiOqu-BWEzWk0N4aQiGw-7WPZZW0n0IfkbDOZ753VrLG92haTQkkUUytYdAh-Z1OiwBGtoshKGZ3CUuHSgt6Wk5-osvlmlQRtVp88BZYOheNHSVuicVw-TnhTG14jylX4BPPDu2FfeUkv6BE0tjo3J0YWHtkCgPdZrdi0bQmoqJYl82DMZQYho690AM23yJPy9YgStvZaTNQ7m5NJ11Ytmq_B5TG8IKu6HEcaxc0g8DDUhhue9wfMUxra-iBZcvZSsQ3AHNQh7ZOHijZ2SEZXdEAu_F9SIOilN1CCqNZKQ4-QF2b_sC5Ihf)** [ ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=56cb892a5f894bd9ad69b4d196f50b22&_e=aXUdKNFckdiOqu-BWEzWk0N4aQiGw-7WPZZW0n0IfkbDOZ753VrLG92haTQkkUUytYdAh-Z1OiwBGtoshKGZ3CUuHSgt6Wk5-osvlmlQRtWJrU0j-yo82p6ayUZt2DsSWom8MbtgGpz1REHO_infTxh3WAhM4_g0okcnpPX0b_ssYxsFlnbJJo2R18qtPqvRhsHFu7nbKiCEBXcjRh3YCi6dY4EhhjFaqg8-V94bkD6S4OJ5JDqhTh1bjnkUKoVkJw9HyTgwpIXwgwet9Ubd40_nxhfOK2fFCafegtXqPxSFl2GWqFcOxBJyw4z-MdOy) But we all know that through and through, I will stand with our women and men in blue.
It’s time we rally up the Lehigh Valley and send a loud and clear message to my opponent and Nancy Pelosi’s ally, Susan Wild, that we SUPPORT our police force, we back the blue, and do NOT want to abandon our great police officers.
**[Will you take this quick survey now?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=56cb892a5f894bd9ad69b4d196f50b22&_e=aXUdKNFckdiOqu-BWEzWk30xqhrp0k-zpsa2WnTII1eDSdqhlHa4yH0uuIE419O17Zroa1XDjAQeCsmGT_AJww2E4E5kN15rbqjghjL0TQctIPDPN3NGMU9oqodJ7GtIW0bbxwL0B0G7lRlxz0mFM9I3NGaZ8Xpe2QBzyhDugTM0xGXXJ5sBKKlqtGiSIRFIZ1CnHMdZ95Ngqrv-XPSNrIGvCQ_t75vvMlLF3tlwEHJvalIvfImY3-uAyZFo0Un8L3g0QU5pSCE8WNwPCkbpuXrI6ipk9eyxHm-AzY_38E6LpnQ6_CB1lVTyk09p4aZGjZEoQ0cgkHmGrHZbDEIOqIQAnBn1CpX579WtRYAfR3EMwTKjGBSB9nL7LlOsnGxzbbLUefcyaRhF-Clh9yxPBaw-QmpL31o8dQdsZDbiuKPRRHtTp45g08tTGtlRt452A0I7BylbJnUAgMU_w4LpiQ%3D%3D) **
**[If you feel so inclined, would you consider chipping in whatever you are able RIGHT NOW to show that you stand alongside our police force and want to help ensure that come November, they will be protected?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=56cb892a5f894bd9ad69b4d196f50b22&_e=aXUdKNFckdiOqu-BWEzWk2sRpUel4oYHD081bCmLII6uNbBONs988L-lHsnReiYsT8pwFSvXsJ9rDFwoPY_OxYQON0M5XtDGy9htWeAf830EGNKxMY20jBDz5D_z40p68_uNoRyOTskcV2tEGf_hekWLHJPm_chpcHbe-7XLoCPQfOZ1TM4bzSCzzxeNkwsEvyHTkGhk2L2eK03C7tjcH0j_B9RTi0J20aPJlUAOV5t0w_b0huv_NkO7iH4BVhz-iVEWjLmwXr3hdklQ807HLg2QiHfVyoMDOgP3ak0bnQrAxrdXWFoVUrcd2apbgsd8CACJICYGXjFuYEeQ6HTYXsab0VW6hbE2-Ut21RnKD0uIb-k2GTM4SX2wsPA9PxU9OsiynAdnqYv27BYS35MYxypK8UPVvKDOIx5IFDIxgqNJ3jFemPnAG8cbutAHIyOdy5fE68jWDivdlIDccYStsA%3D%3D)**

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Election DELAYED!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Trump doesn't care.
|
---

| | Recently, President Trump suggested delaying the November election. **That would be unconstitutional and a complete overreach of authority.** **100,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED:
[_Tell Trump he CANNOT delay the election ->_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2be/3d199a51/2fadda43/7364b5e7/1903606224/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200819pet_a")** Only Congress has the authority to set the date for elections._But Trump doesn 't care._ He only cares that he's down in the polls, and he'll do anything to undermine the validity of the results should they not go his way. That's why Trump has spent months falsely attacking the integrity of voting by mail. He even sued Nevada for mailing ballots to registered voters to ensure they can safely cast their ballots this November. **What Trump is doing is another form of voter suppression.** I'm proud to be endorsed by Let America Vote. Together, we're fighting back against Trump's undemocratic and dangerous attacks on the upcoming election. But we need you to stand with us. [_**We 're working to gather 100,000 signatures to tell Trump loud and clear that he CANNOT delay the 2020 election. Will you add your name?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2be/3d199a51/2fadda43/7364b5e7/1903606224/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200819pet_a") Thank you, Kathy |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=20Huckleby?=
subject: Fighting back against Nancy Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Conservative Victoria Spartz’s opponent was endorsed by Barack Obama! Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469650?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-5thdistrict-081820?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_Spartz_081820dlb&amount=&mc_cid=c3d6dcc70c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

Hoosier Republican,

We have a battleground race on the ground in the 5th district. The DCCC has targeted it as part of their Red-to-Blue campaign, and Nancy Pelosi is helping the Democrat raise money.

We have a solid conservative candidate running for this open seat, and it’s imperative that we keep it RED this November.

Victoria Spartz needs us to band together as she fights hard to bring home this win for the GOP. If we lose this seat, there is almost no chance that we’ll be able to win our House majority back.

We cannot afford another term with Nancy Pelosi in the Speaker’s Office.

The Democrat base is fired up to win this seat, and they are pouring huge amounts of outside special interest money into electing Christina Hale. She’s running as a “moderate,” but don’t be fooled! She’s exactly the kind of tax-and-spend liberal that Democrats can’t wait to impose on Hoosiers. If elected, she’s a vote in Nancy Pelosi’s pocket.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: How to get tested
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
One of the best defenses against COVID-19 is providing accurate and widely available testing to Rhode Islanders.
We've been a national leader in this regard, and we've brought drive-through and walk-up sites into the communities that need it most. We have run over 440,000 tests and have tested more than 234,000 Rhode Islanders. Our percent positive rate has been consistently below 3% since we started Phase 3, in large part thanks to our aggressive testing strategy.
There are lots of different ways to get tested. It's important to have different options because what works for one person doesn't necessarily work for another. Today, I want to lay out exactly how to get tested in RI.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_YWvgksXpK2xB0OBlvtjdoE7dENzcc8VnMCNRLXI8uEBIa9pck34FVHS_EJsevMXPrSVlWJZXr9yhZjuGmrbJtXP2MKFTU3bn1cOULS8ECCcz-LZkPVJTyu5-iUPWpuSJ4Ilfhy8nniBZdDfw6M7Lph0TBhc2eEN_JAk-yzSIA9q6_u7Rz58PxnHufXFCtuzzJBKhy9A1ec=&c=hFmd3Gpdlwr5nLFwQySrm7DUJdKBnV9WQOGDIlBawoDBfQX3pgw21w==&ch=BCuILiOrupjgGJYQHkOodlEa5OQ9iIBaEdfCYyujbVGL0QwnL1PLZw==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_YWvgksXpK2xB0OBlvtjdoE7dENzcc8VnMCNRLXI8uEBIa9pck34FVHS_EJsevMXPrSVlWJZXr9yhZjuGmrbJtXP2MKFTU3bn1cOULS8ECCcz-LZkPVJTyu5-iUPWpuSJ4Ilfhy8nniBZdDfw6M7Lph0TBhc2eEN_JAk-yzSIA9q6_u7Rz58PxnHufXFCtuzzJBKhy9A1ec=&c=hFmd3Gpdlwr5nLFwQySrm7DUJdKBnV9WQOGDIlBawoDBfQX3pgw21w==&ch=BCuILiOrupjgGJYQHkOodlEa5OQ9iIBaEdfCYyujbVGL0QwnL1PLZw==).
---
| If you wake up tomorrow and have symptoms that may be indicative of COVID-19--cough, difficulty breathing, fever or chills, muscle or body aches, sore throat, headache, nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, stuffy nose, fatigue or recent loss of taste or smell--you need to stay home, pick up the phone, and schedule a test. There are two ways to do that:
First, you can call your primary care provider. If you have a health care provider you see regularly, call them and tell them about your symptoms, and they will schedule a test for you.
Second, you can call a community health clinic or respiratory clinic.This is primarily for Rhode Islanders who don't have a primary health care provider. Rhode Islanders who are undocumented or uninsured can also use this option and call one of Rhode Island's free health clinics. You can find the full list of clinics at [health.ri.gov/covid](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_YWvgksXpK2xB0OBlvtjdoE7dENzcc8VnMCNRLXI8uEBIa9pck34FSg-I9DnUCvm6bv_zS9NZgpRn1y6tfXCTh2EC_X3khpsS52lkLVHGuQN4jsnMioTqrjFCvvjaI_KQ4Yrf2yzoiGqdRjkiJ_ycw==&c=hFmd3Gpdlwr5nLFwQySrm7DUJdKBnV9WQOGDIlBawoDBfQX3pgw21w==&ch=BCuILiOrupjgGJYQHkOodlEa5OQ9iIBaEdfCYyujbVGL0QwnL1PLZw==).
If you do not have symptoms but want to get tested, you can go to [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_YWvgksXpK2xB0OBlvtjdoE7dENzcc8VnMCNRLXI8uEBIa9pck34FWSn_GfiwYGIoPDMmG_W9_CM5P40vJJOzSJdnILIuY_K8czZUeVOu7wRbr2bkNPhOoiYDx8VspR4O-vnsWaJDfI=&c=hFmd3Gpdlwr5nLFwQySrm7DUJdKBnV9WQOGDIlBawoDBfQX3pgw21w==&ch=BCuILiOrupjgGJYQHkOodlEa5OQ9iIBaEdfCYyujbVGL0QwnL1PLZw==). This is for anybody who falls into one of these categories:

* Close contact workers
* First responders
* Bus drivers
* Child care workers
* 18-to-39-year-olds
* Anyone who recently attended a large protest or demonstration
* Anyone who is traveling to a state that requires a test
* Anyone who is returning from a state on RI's quarantine list, which is available on [health.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_YWvgksXpK2xB0OBlvtjdoE7dENzcc8VnMCNRLXI8uEBIa9pck34FXAfj61laJHzQYtqnUsU8GGH4G0cU682cI89OZxw9ZNyawKl11GgU8spf6JyaDeQNXsw66JT3jG1fXehQHSX0jY=&c=hFmd3Gpdlwr5nLFwQySrm7DUJdKBnV9WQOGDIlBawoDBfQX3pgw21w==&ch=BCuILiOrupjgGJYQHkOodlEa5OQ9iIBaEdfCYyujbVGL0QwnL1PLZw==)

---
|
---
| We've made significant progress on improving the time it takes to get results. As of this week, we are running more than 2,000 tests per day with turnaround times of 48 hours or less. We're already seeing a difference. Our average turnaround time, which was 5 days a month ago, is down to under 2.5 days. Of course, that's an average, and I don't want to diminish the very real frustration of Rhode Islanders who are still waiting four, five or six days for a test result. While I'm proud that are numbers are improving, I know we still have more work to do. Over the next few weeks, we'll be steadily expanding capacity until we're able to run 7,000 tests a day with a 48-hour average turnaround.
Things are moving in the right direction on a few fronts for Rhode Islanders - our cases are slowly declining and out of 1,000 visits last week, our business inspectors found 96% of staff and customers wearing masks - the highest we've seen - and 98% of businesses complying with capacity restrictions. But we can't get complacent, and we all need to stay serious about following the health guidance in order to stay ahead of this virus.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=6ff3c640-0df7-4fcb-9b72-cc903a372504)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=6ff3c640-0df7-4fcb-9b72-cc903a372504) | [About our service provider](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/service-provider?cc=about-service-provider)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: An update on the border wall!
body:
President Trump traveled yesterday to Yuma, Arizona, where he met with Border Patrol officers and gave Americans an update on the border wall... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6fb33e680d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 19, 2020
---
| | |
# **An update on the border wall!**

**President Trump** traveled yesterday to Yuma, Arizona, where he met with Border Patrol officers and gave Americans an update on the border wall with Mexico.

**“This administration** has basically funded us for 733 miles” of wall, Lieutenant General Todd Semonite of the Army Corps of Engineers said. “Forty-nine different projects are all going in the ground” across four states.

🎬 [**President Trump: “In 2 weeks, we will have hit 300 miles of wall.”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=48de305ad1&e=3ee4985eea)

**The new wall system** is one piece of President Trump’s larger agenda to protect America’s security and sovereignty. Last year, he negotiated historic agreements with Mexico, Guatemala, El Salvador, and Honduras to help stop the flood of illegal immigration across our border. Mexico even deployed thousands of troops to help.

**Border apprehensions** have fallen by more than 70 percent since last May as a result.

**American law enforcement** officers are stopping crime, drugs, and gangs in their tracks, as well. So far this fiscal year, U.S. Customs and Border Protection has seized over 100,000 pounds of cocaine, over 83,000 pounds of meth, and over 2,700 pounds of fentanyl. Border Patrol apprehended 976 alien gang members last year, including 464 from the vile MS-13 gang. (MS-13’s motto is “Kill, Rape, Control.”)

🎬 [**WATCH: Border wall leads to huge reductions in human trafficking**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b19f3744ca&e=3ee4985eea)

**“You’re setting records** at the border,” President Trump told Border Patrol officers yesterday. “You’ve been unbelievable.”

**Border protection** is more important than ever as the Coronavirus pandemic spreads globally. Strong border security is crucial to [**helping** **slow the spread**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=650799b605&e=3ee4985eea) of the disease.

**“A lot of the procedures** that we are putting in place today are having a real impact on applying a consequence to those that are entering the country illegally,” Acting Homeland Security Secretary Chad Wolf said.

**“We are returning** 90 percent of those individuals within 120 minutes, to date. That’s a big accomplishment.”

📷 [**PHOTO: New border wall system is going up!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8f7eaf9398&e=3ee4985eea)

📖 **READ:**[**President Trump’s full update on the border wall**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b12d4dd015&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: Democrats left town. President Trump took action.**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d074a0749&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **While Speaker Nancy Pelosi** and her Democrat colleagues went home without a deal to help American workers and students struggling during the pandemic, President Trump remained hard at work.

**He took four major** executive actions—to stop evictions, provide unemployment insurance, pause federal student loan payments, and cut payroll taxes.

**“The concerns of everyday Americans** were not the concerns of Democrats on Capitol Hill,” Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany said today.
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump with U.S. ****Customs and Border Protection officers in Yuma, Arizona** | August 18, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8f28df3a49&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e433472466&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ff2c9d3765)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

President Trump traveled yesterday to Yuma, Arizona, where he met with Border Patrol officers and gave Americans an update on the border wall with Mexico. “This administration has basically funded us for 733 miles” of wall, Lieutenant General Todd Semonite of the Army Corps of Engineers said. “Forty-nine different projects are all going in the ground” across four states. 🎬 The new wall system is one piece of President Trump’s larger agenda to protect America’s security and sovereignty. Last year, he negotiated historic agreements with Mexico, Guatemala, El Salvador, and Honduras to help stop the flood of illegal immigration across our border. Mexico even deployed thousands of troops to help. Border apprehensions have fallen by more than 70 percent since last May as a result. American law enforcement officers are stopping crime, drugs, and gangs in their tracks, as well. So far this fiscal year, U.S. Customs and Border Protection has seized over 100,000 pounds of cocaine, over 83,000 pounds of meth, and over 2,700 pounds of fentanyl. Border Patrol apprehended 976 alien gang members last year, including 464 from the vile MS-13 gang. (MS-13’s motto is “Kill, Rape, Control.”) 🎬 “You’re setting records at the border,” President Trump told Border Patrol officers yesterday. “You’ve been unbelievable.” Border protection is more important than ever as the Coronavirus pandemic spreads globally. Strong border security is crucial to of the disease. “A lot of the procedures that we are putting in place today are having a real impact on applying a consequence to those that are entering the country illegally,” Acting Homeland Security Secretary Chad Wolf said. “We are returning 90 percent of those individuals within 120 minutes, to date. That’s a big accomplishment.” 📷 📖 READ: | | Video of the day: Democrats left town. President Trump took action. | | While Speaker Nancy Pelosi and her Democrat colleagues went home without a deal to help American workers and students struggling during the pandemic, President Trump remained hard at work. He took four major executive actions—to stop evictions, provide unemployment insurance, pause federal student loan payments, and cut payroll taxes. “The concerns of everyday Americans were not the concerns of Democrats on Capitol Hill,” Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany said today. | | Photo of the Day | | President Trump with U.S. Customs and Border Protection officers in Yuma, Arizona | August 18, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Barack Obama
subject: The difference between Joe Biden and Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The first time I spoke at a Democratic convention, I asked a simple question: |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
Peter, sixteen years ago, the first time I spoke at a Democratic convention, I asked a simple question: Do we participate in a politics of cynicism, or do we participate in a politics of hope?

It's a question that's more relevant than ever today, as I prepare my speech for this year's convention. I know the answer, and I think you do, too. So before I share my thoughts, [I'd like to ask you to chip in $25 or whatever you can afford to help elect my friend Joe Biden as the next President of the United States.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

**The Republican Party made its choice long ago, and we're seeing the consequences of it every day.** They have no answers for the COVID-19 pandemic that has stolen the lives of more than 170,000 Americans and shuttered countless businesses -- just excuses and blame.

They offer no help for the millions of Americans who have lost their jobs, and who now must make unthinkable choices like whether to spend the last dollars in their checking account on rent or food.

**They have no serious plans for the great challenges facing us for years to come,** and they barely even pretend to. Instead, they try to fan the flames of resentment to divide and distract us from their failures.

**Joe Biden is different.** And Peter, if you're ready to reject the politics of cynicism and resume the hard work of building a more just, more generous, more democratic America, then [I need you to chip in $25 or whatever you can to help elect Joe Biden in November.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

---
**Joe practices the politics of hope** \-- not a blind hope, but a hard-won faith that America is better than this, and that our best days still lie ahead of us.

I saw it every single day when we worked together at the White House. He was instrumental to helping us rebuild from the last Republican recession. He can do it again - not in a way that benefits the rich and well-connected, but in a way that grows the economy for everybody.

**That's because Joe Biden is a man who lives the values his parents passed on to him.** Hard work. Dignity. Respect. Responsibility. He is a man whose own life has taught him how to persevere through the hardest of times and the greatest of loss.

Joe feels the grief of every family that's lost loved ones to this pandemic. He understands the pain of the mothers and fathers who have to tell their children that they've lost their jobs. But most importantly, he knows where to take us from here - how to use the power of the presidency to address our nation's great challenges head-on, and to build back better.

Perhaps most importantly, **Joe understands that when times get tough, we don't give up -- we get up.** And so it's time for us all to get up, right now, and stand with Joe in this fight for the soul of America.

[I'm urging you, Peter: Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can afford right now to help elect Joe Biden as the next President of the United States.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.19_B1_bho1_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana: the Indy 500 is here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
The Indy 500 is back this weekend, and we couldn’t be more excited to watch the Greatest Spectacle in Racing. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6a18a060bf7f4f218532cadac5189b8f&_e=iD_vGbIhxjeRxQELzzoSl1vilQvz6WRYbvni-Gu0lyd0kQn5F-im4E_8mcT2OVKCv1p3pPoD0oQKD4xGnG7-qXhxv-AEisffCq4XMcYaKRg6To5-7ZRhwofWhHV3AnwIf_4EdS3Ot9oQZFeqcyAC5b7JfZKQnInc2DMuFDnPSUL7jESedZ82_eejfgsQ6lXycrrupeGoulMiiTBE-rlONibnqAFKu1kdXwolXuJTzfwMehQGSMb23qnbW1Iy-lT2-TXjqboNIfx_-E5vYrK-PxGNsunmA9YrVKgxGIhok7Xu8Z8nHox32Rp2zY4pcU0_7hOd87YCe00FctDPhk06HQmAkqu5nNa__Vfudo7aUxAK-PppbkOQSTQAOnJ9mZDsbRbTxQ6iZLhpsn_DK3jo67nzIg1OU3Wd44z5amEa3-n3k-FpTtCYERsNoBiJgq_OnyTD4EGWJjyBr_jVpJ9CiJeL7tO8s6L8q4ZPCdoAhNg%3D) Friend,

_We’re fired up. _
The Indy 500 is finally here this weekend, and we couldn’t be more excited to watch the Greatest Spectacle in Racing. Back Home Again in Indiana, the cold bottle of milk on victory lane — the traditions are too many to count.
We won’t be able to crowd Indianapolis Motor Speedway this year, but we had our crew come up with a list of things we can do to celebrate race day. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6a18a060bf7f4f218532cadac5189b8f&_e=iD_vGbIhxjeRxQELzzoSl1vilQvz6WRYbvni-Gu0lyd0kQn5F-im4E_8mcT2OVKCv1p3pPoD0oQKD4xGnG7-qXhxv-AEisffCq4XMcYaKRg6To5-7ZRhwofWhHV3AnwIf_4EdS3Ot9oQZFeqcyAC5b7JfZKQnInc2DMuFDnPSUL7jESedZ82_eejfgsQ6lXycrrupeGoulMiiTBE-rlONibnqAFKu1kdXwolXuJTzfwMehQGSMb23qnbW1Iy-lT2-TXjqboNIfx_-E5vYrK-P0LkyyJevMZbSu1KBAICkLU4dddwUe3eZmI4PpzeML2g-yc4Pi0CoaeAfyUdmVvopp2495BoBZwZuIxKtGYyk9oA70atGjP81albbvO5yLyY7MQXKkbI9X1ooaA608MjkAnJbG07UDExiRO87RAvB1xYpIoZNFQrtejKzePcwwDKCVvi4VLyiQeQil7RFa_WH4Pi_5UW0xMVJvbcv7PvkXU%3D)
* **Host a socially distanced tailgate in your backyard** \- Having an at-home tailgate is the next best thing to the party in the infield. Invite some family and friends over for a cookout!
* **Watch it on TV** \- The good news about this year’s Indy 500? There’s no blackout! You’ll be able to watch all the excitement from your couch.
* **[Watch this classic clip of the late Jim Nabors singing Back Home Again in Indiana](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6a18a060bf7f4f218532cadac5189b8f&_e=iD_vGbIhxjeRxQELzzoSlwb4kbPTgfeG-ztb8GTqJzln6d_4bQbcryEieV-g0Itwv8tN5pmLu36Vez7Od-sIar8Mq8bFwKvLtfW1o-FJ9w8PHENVuZj31GqzzWhiQC94yJNwZyS_FVvIWqwFg5Z8uGvosnsQc_vo89Bdiwo3Cw0MlHlyBdYFT4UAqtqbO8i2i-BIHpT6lZ67_GazMkf5Qk_43zPxbr6uDeMfaEj969Fkie4W3qs8p-fZgBZ6ALzEQhp9mggLpEFgvSARWL8ayN20lG3lM_782WFSMAmLsM0CdK-v2D2u1QtoXWr1lPZrk_sdnuJaipDvErw_smYjy1Z3mCF-kpy6Fhoe96-ZLAyVZQKUSGMArBX99AUD7UgQFpwntp6xSHAnjfW3ZNKzVagox3bn4uNLCjYvRlh040owsuNg7c0Q6eV0RomxldKKnrAG4CI4-lg4Srx_1Cb4Mc1EjCXYMbZehj4IoGV2lkc%3D)** \- This is one of our favorite traditions of all time, and race day wouldn’t be the same without the annual performance of this Indiana classic.
* **Pick the driver you'll cheer for** \- It’s always more fun when you have some skin in the game. Pick a driver, and yell until your voice is gone!
* **Wear patriotic clothes** \- It’s not the traditional Memorial Day weekend, but there’s perhaps no better time to don your red, white, and blue than for race day!
* **Enjoy your favorite adult beverages responsibly** \- There’s nothing like sipping on a cold one while watching the Indy 500! We recommend grabbing something from an Indiana brewery, winery, or distillery. Remember you can now buy on race day (Thank you, Gov. Holcomb!)
* **Fly the checkered flag** \- There’s nothing as exciting as the checkered flag waving at the end of the race. So get your checkered flag out at home and recreate the moment.

What are you planning on doing to celebrate the Indy 500? Let us know below! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6a18a060bf7f4f218532cadac5189b8f&_e=iD_vGbIhxjeRxQELzzoSl1vilQvz6WRYbvni-Gu0lyd0kQn5F-im4E_8mcT2OVKCv1p3pPoD0oQKD4xGnG7-qXhxv-AEisffCq4XMcYaKRg6To5-7ZRhwofWhHV3AnwIf_4EdS3Ot9oQZFeqcyAC5b7JfZKQnInc2DMuFDnPSUL7jESedZ82_eejfgsQ6lXycrrupeGoulMiiTBE-rlONibnqAFKu1kdXwolXuJTzfwMehQGSMb23qnbW1Iy-lT2-TXjqboNIfx_-E5vYrK-P7MkWN293VsK_9EawxPsn02FrYZy1O3Ibb2If-ziJqXOZnxlFvWOZwT5CiMeyxrzwa0fTv6tupvPBbLdIFvEy48yyG18-rNhBb4JeVx7VF96B7cEFA7E66wSqc-1-8Gw9LwVDwxxJOH71S4rMQBEJiEuFKsAoricmcf33Ij1EgWrEVSETPWicoJwIl_S07RHezxjcIBK4fEbiTuoFJtvbeg%3D) Thank you for reading. -Your Holcomb Crew |

name: Mark Warner HQ
subject: Take Action: Protect the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We need Congress to go back to Washington and take immediate action.
|
---

| | **We _must_ protect and fund the U.S. Postal Service.** | [Add your name if you agree](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db5c/53d9897e/5432ed16/1c8830ae/3569052527/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-vbm")
---
Derek --

Millions of Americans rely on the U.S. Postal Service every day to receive their Social Security checks, pay their bills, get important medicine, and stay in touch with their loved ones. It's an absolutely _**essential**_ service.

**And this November, many more Americans will rely on the postal service to safely cast their ballots in the November 3rd general election.**

Recent cuts made by the Trump administration threaten the postal service's ability to keep providing the reliable, efficient service that Americans count on. The administration is now trying to backtrack, claiming that they're solving a problem of their own making by reversing these senseless cuts. **Words are not enough.

We need Congress to go back to Washington and take immediate action. [Will you join Mark Warner in calling for immediate congressional action to protect the postal service?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db5c/53d9897e/5432ed16/1c8830ae/3569052527/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-vbm")**

We're living in unprecedented times. A year ago, no one anticipated that we'd need to weigh protecting our health and casting our ballot. USPS and mail-in ballots provide a safe alternative in many states -- but only if the post office has the funding it needs to keep delivering the mail reliably and on time. The Trump administration's back and forth on postal service policy has cast doubt on the ability of the agency to fulfill its duties. **That cannot stand.**

Cancer patients depend on the post office for their medicine. Small businesses depend on the post office to pay bills on time. **And every American must be able to depend on the USPS to securely deliver millions of ballots in time to be counted in this critically important election.**
**[Add your name now to join Mark Warner's call for immediate action.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db5c/53d9897e/5432ed16/1c8830ae/3569052527/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-vbm")**
Thank you,

Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db5c/53d9897e/5432ed16/1c8830ad/3569052527/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200820_p_1_fl__718__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|

Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Defeating “Pelosi’s Puppet”
body:
Close to midnight last night, President Trump publically congratulated me for our primary victory!
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-389097-917222-5150143-50f327889b-7de5227963)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-389097-917222-5150142-3c62777c1f-7de5227963) Close to midnight last night, President Trump publically congratulated me for our primary victory!

Minutes later, our President did it again, and again and again.

It was a TRUMP TWEETSTORM about our work to win this election in Florida’s 21st District, home to President and Mrs. Trump!

Earlier in the night, RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel called to congratulate me and I was honored when she said that she considers me a “change agent” for the Republican Party.

As I said in my acceptance speech last night, I won’t be beholden to the Republican Establishment and I won’t be shackled into silence when Democrats dive off the deep end.

This is about us, you and me. And while I’m appreciative of Chairwoman McDaniel’s call last night, I know that we’re pretty much all alone as we fight our way to Washington.

The primary is over, we took a breath to celebrate and now we’re back to work.

We have 75 days until the election and $3 MILLION to raise in the next month.
[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-389097-917222-5150142-3c62777c1f-7de5227963) Please chip in $5 now to celebrate our victory and help us take on what President Trump calls “Pelosi’s Puppet” Lois Frankel. Donate $5, one dollar for each of the tweets President Trump posted to celebrate with us!

Please forgive my short email. My team and I worked through the night and I’ve been on constant interviews since this morning.

But I have MUCH more to report and want to tell you all about the dirty tricks used against us in the final days of the primary race.

For now, please help us meet our daily fundraising goal by contributing all that you can.

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
