subject: Mitch McConnell just departed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | [**McConnell goes on month-long vacation WITHOUT passing covid relief**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb51/290060426/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Ben-Ray-Senate-Survey?source=20200819_em_pet_b1_lujan_30") [I'm disgusted beyond belief. Mitch McConnell just sent his Republican Senate off for a MONTH-LONG vacation -- WITHOUT passing the COVID-19 relief measures that Americans are so desperately waiting on. I need 50,000 signatures on my emergency petition to DEMAND the Senate cut their vacation short and return to Congress immediately to pass these relief measures. Will you add your name before midnight tonight? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb51/290060426/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Ben-Ray-Senate-Survey?source=20200819_em_pet_b1_lujan_30") | I'm so disgusted, I can hardly type this email.

McConnell just skipped town for a MONTH-LONG vacation -- leaving millions waiting desperately for COVID-19 relief. [**I 'm calling on him to return IMMEDIATELY.**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb51/290060426/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Ben-Ray-Senate-Survey?source=20200819_em_pet_b1_lujan_30")

[**_BEFORE MIDNIGHT: I need 50,000 signatures on my emergency petition demanding the Senate cut their vacation short and return to Congress IMMEDIATELY. Millions of unemployed Americans are desperately waiting on McConnell to pass COVID-19 relief. How dare he skip town for an entire month and leave us hanging. He must return NOW. Will you sign immediately? >> _**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb51/290060426/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Ben-Ray-Senate-Survey?source=20200819_em_pet_b1_lujan_30")
** ** [****NAME** : dpwillis67@gmail.com******](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb51/290060426/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Ben-Ray-Senate-Survey?source=20200819_em_pet_b1_lujan_30") ** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb51/290060426/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Ben-Ray-Senate-Survey?source=20200819_em_pet_b1_lujan_30")**
---

I'm furious beyond words.

Mitch McConnell just left town for a MONTH-long vacation.

\- He knows unemployment for millions has [**_EXPIRED_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb51/290060426/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Ben-Ray-Senate-Survey?source=20200819_em_pet_b1_lujan_30")
\- He knows the USPS is inches from [**_COLLAPSING_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb51/290060426/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Ben-Ray-Senate-Survey?source=20200819_em_pet_b1_lujan_30")
\- He's blocked Democrats' relief bill for [**_3 MONTHS_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb51/290060426/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Ben-Ray-Senate-Survey?source=20200819_em_pet_b1_lujan_30")

But despite the fact that millions suffering from this crisis desperately need McConnell to act...

He just decided this was the perfect time to send the Senate off on vacation!

Not on my watch. [**_McConnell needs to return to Congress and do his job NOW._**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb51/290060426/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Ben-Ray-Senate-Survey?source=20200819_em_pet_b1_lujan_30")

[_**I need 50,000 signatures on my emergency petition calling on the Senate to cut their vacation short IMMEDIATELY, and return to Congress to do their jobs. Americans should not be waiting and suffering while McConnell and his Republicans take the next month off. I cannot believe that needs to be said. Will you sign my emergency petition before midnight? >>**_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb51/290060426/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Ben-Ray-Senate-Survey?source=20200819_em_pet_b1_lujan_30")

Thank you,

Ben Ray

---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb56/290060426/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb57/290060426/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb54/290060426/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb55/290060426/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb4a/290060426/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb4b/290060426/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb48/290060426/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb54/290060426/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb56/290060426/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2cc/18e32a7f/4a2f6200/7b20eb49/290060426/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Official Jon Ossoff HQ
subject: Re: Tim Kaine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Senator Kaine is supporting Jon! |
---
Friend,

Great news: Senator Tim Kaine announced his endorsement of Jon Ossoff!

In an email sent to his supporters earlier this week, Sen. Kaine highlighted Jon's courage, values, and toughness, and wrote that "Jon is someone Georgians can rely on."

**[Read Sen. Kaine's forwarded message below, then chip in $15 to elect Jon and give him, Kaine, and the Democrats a Senate majority.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f04598/858235667/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_tk_en?refcode=em_2020_08_19_tk_en&amount=15")**
| | [Chip in $15 right now >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f04598/858235667/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_tk_en?refcode=em_2020_08_19_tk_en&amount=15")
---
Thanks for your support!

Team Ossoff

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Tim Kaine
**Date:** August 17, 2020
**Subject:** Join me in supporting Jon Ossoff for Senate

Friend,

On November 3, we are going to close the door on Donald Trump's presidency. Then, we can expand our potential to make real progress on the issues that make a difference in people's lives.

**But to achieve that potential, we need my friend Jon Ossoff in the United States Senate. Here's why:**

It's time to elect a new generation of leaders. And Jon Ossoff's achievements as an investigative journalist -- leading a team that's exposed war crimes, enslavement, murder, and bribery all over the planet -- speak to his courage, his values, and his toughness.

Jon and his supporters have made this one of the country's most competitive races during a time when dozens of states are coming into play. So today I'm asking you to dig deep and invest in Jon's victory. Will you donate right now to help Jon Ossoff win in Georgia and flip the Senate?
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [DONATE $15](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f0459b/858235667/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_tk_en?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em_2020_08_19_tk_en_ex_15")
---
| [DONATE $25](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f0459a/858235667/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_tk_en?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_2020_08_19_tk_en_ex_25")
---
| [Donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f0459d/858235667/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_tk_en?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_08_19_tk_en_ex_other")
---
Senate Republicans have used the past four years to give tax breaks to the wealthy, scheme how to take health care away from millions, and confirm scores of unqualified or extreme judicial and executive nominees.

The solution to removing the GOP stranglehold on the Senate lies in no small part with Jon Ossoff in Georgia. Jon is surging in the polls as more and more voters learn about his history fighting corruption.

But here's what's even more important: Jon is someone Georgians can rely on. He is focused on ensuring every American has affordable health care and rebuilding the economy so working families and small businesses thrive, and he's committed to passing a new Voting Rights Act and a new Civil Rights Act.

**When I look at Georgia, I see what Virginia looked like just a few years ago. Democrats are making huge inroads, and if we can all do our part to invest and help good, smart leaders like Jon reach the finish line, we can flip Georgia.**

Jon is neck-and-neck in the polls with his pro-Trump opponent who has repeatedly voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. But the GOP knows control of the Senate comes down to Georgia, so they are spending big to keep their power. Mitch McConnell's allies and super PACs have already committed over $25 million to stop Jon.

Jon isn't taking contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. That means he's relying on a small-dollar grassroots campaign to power him to victory.

**We can't flip the Senate without you, friend. Can you chip in $15 to elect Jon Ossoff in Georgia and help chart a new course for this country?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [DONATE $15](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f0459b/858235667/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_tk_en?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em_2020_08_19_tk_en_ex_15")
---
| [DONATE $25](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f0459a/858235667/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_tk_en?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_2020_08_19_tk_en_ex_25")
---
| [Donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f0459d/858235667/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_tk_en?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_08_19_tk_en_ex_other")
---
Thank you,

Tim Kaine
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ Click here to receive fewer emails.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f0459c/858235667/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/less-emails-new") | [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f0459f/858235667/VEsHBQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/content/unsubscribe")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f0459c/858235667/VEsHBw/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/less-emails-new") If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f0459f/858235667/VEsHBg/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/content/unsubscribe")

Our campaign is powered by supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to electing Jon Ossoff and helping Democrats win back the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f045a1/858235667/VEsHAQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_fr_q32019_ossoff-footer?refcode=MS_FR_HP_X_footer_X__X__X&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700&recurring=auto") Thanks for having Jon's back!

| [Donate Now >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2527/5b2c1286/3f584b50/25f045a0/858235667/VEsHAA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_fr_q32019_ossoff-footer?refcode=MS_FR_X_footer_X__X_X&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
